| | I want to give you a quick re-cap of where we stand:
1. Extremists like Marsha Blackburn, Ted Cruz, and Tom Cotton all weighed into the Senate race because they know it's essential to keeping control of the Senate come November.

2. Our opponent held a tele-town hall with Donald Trump and called him the "GREATEST PRESIDENT" even though this Administration has disproportionately hurt Tennessee.

3. The last end-of-month deadline before the Tennessee primary is MIDNIGHT TOMORROW.

[_**Our race has gotten exponentially more competitive even in just the past couple of weeks. In order for a people-powered campaign like ours to succeed, we need everyone pitching in. name: U.S. Postal Service Alert
subject: post offices in Georgia (urgent update)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warnock for Georgia
body:
Things are not looking good.
| | |
---
**BREAKING NEWS: U.S. Postal Service on track to go bankrupt by September - unless we take action NOW!**
|
---
The U.S. Postal Service is in crisis, friend.

**Officials warn that without emergency funding, post offices across the country - including in Georgia - will be forced to shutter. And _600,000_ hardworking employees could lose their jobs.**
The Postal Service is one of our nation's oldest, most vital institutions: Millions of Americans depend on it for access to lifesaving medication, Social Security benefits, groceries - and critically, mail-in ballots.
But in the midst of this public health crisis, the Trump administration _refuses_ to take action to save the Postal Service. Instead, they're working as hard as they can to sabotage mail delivery and DESTROY it for good.
That's why we need to speak up IMMEDIATELY and demand Congress save the U.S. Postal Service before it's too late. **We need another 62 concerned Democrats from Georgia to sign our urgent petition by midnight - but time is running out, and we still don't see your name.**
**[Please, friend: Add your name by midnight to DEMAND Congress save the U.S. Postal Service!](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.%3D%3D/?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "https://petitions.signforgood.com/Save-the-US-Postal-Service?firstName=&lastName=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=30004&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&code=warnock&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsurveys.signforgood.com%2Fwarnock-usps%3Fcode%3Djtk482-ja-nd")**

name: Bill Hagerty
subject: RSVP: Join our Tele-Town Hall with Senator Marsha Blackburn
body:
Your invitation information is enclosed
Peter,Senator Blackburn is the leading conservative voice in the Senate and Tennesseans are very proud of her work supporting and defending President Trump. And I'm pleased to announce she will be joining our next Tele-Town Hall!The Tele-Town Hall will be held Friday, July 31 at 10 a.m. ET/9 a.m. CT. [**You can RSVP here.**](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-phryktl-fuutjhhtj-r/) [](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-phryktl-fuutjhhtj-y/) [RSVP FOR OUR TELE-TOWN HALL WITH SEN. name: Joe Biden
subject: I'm counting on Elizabeth Warren's leadership, and I'm counting on yours, too. Can you join our virtual grassroots fundraiser this Friday?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren Democrats
body:
This Friday, my good friend Elizabeth Warren and I are hosting a virtual discussion on our plan to win this November. And I'd love it if you could join this special event, because victory isn't possib | | | [](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28525027/45c30650/1cd7e31ec/66e81068/2587670310/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://elizabethwarren.com?source=em-header&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")
---
This Friday, my good friend Elizabeth Warren and I are hosting a virtual discussion on our plan to win this November.

And I'd love it if you could join this special event, because victory isn't possible without grassroots supporters like you.

**[If you're able to, please chip in $2 or any amount to join me and Elizabeth Warren this Friday, July 31, at 7:30 p.m. ET. We'll talk about our game plan to win the White House and elect Democrats up and down the ballot in 2020.](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28525027/45c30650/1cd7e31ec/66e8106b/2587670310/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImJ2ZjIwMjBfZnJfd2FycmVuZ3Jhc3Nyb290c2ZyIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTVQyNkZfRU9NX0lOVl9KXzIwMjAwNzI5X1YxUzNfUCJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/bvf2020_fr_warrengrassrootsfr?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMT26F_EOM_INV_J_20200729_V1S3_P")**

I'm counting on Elizabeth for her ideas and her leadership. I'm grateful that she's on the front lines fighting for a government that works for the people who actually built this country -- for working people, not Wall Street.

And I'm counting on you, too.

As a member of Elizabeth's team, you helped build one of the most impressive grassroots movements in the history of politics -- $5 and $10 at a time. You took on corruption. You fought big fights. And you pushed for big ideas.

Leaders like you are the spine of our campaign. I can't make it to the White House without a grassroots campaign by my side -- and that's only possible with grassroots donors.

We've got a heck of a job ahead of us. But if we work together, I know we can get it done. We can win the battle for the soul of our nation -- and start making the big, structural changes we need to make.

**I'd be honored to earn your support. And I hope I'll see you this Friday.**

[If it makes sense for you right now, please make a donation of any amount to join Friday night's special conversation with Elizabeth and me about how we'll win back the White House and transform this country.](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28525027/45c30650/1cd7e31ec/66e8106b/2587670310/VEsEAw/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImJ2ZjIwMjBfZnJfd2FycmVuZ3Jhc3Nyb290c2ZyIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTVQyNkZfRU9NX0lOVl9KXzIwMjAwNzI5X1YxUzNfUCJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/bvf2020_fr_warrengrassrootsfr?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMT26F_EOM_INV_J_20200729_V1S3_P")

Thank you,

Joe Biden

| [**DONATE NOW**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28525027/45c30650/1cd7e31ec/66e8106b/2587670310/VEsEAg/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImJ2ZjIwMjBfZnJfd2FycmVuZ3Jhc3Nyb290c2ZyIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTVQyNkZfRU9NX0lOVl9KXzIwMjAwNzI5X1YxUzNfUCJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/bvf2020_fr_warrengrassrootsfr?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMT26F_EOM_INV_J_20200729_V1S3_P")

name: Sarah Jessica Parker
subject: I've been a Joe Biden supporter from the beginning
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
I've been a Joe Biden supporter from the very beginning. |
---
Peter --

I've been a Joe Biden supporter from the very beginning.

Just before Election Day in 2008, I went to an Obama-Biden campaign office in downtown New York with countless other supporters and reached out to undecided voters.

I believed then as I do now, and I continue to convey to my children, that if we want to create the meaningful change that so many Americans need and deserve, we have to commit and contribute to the effort required. Our country's history is reliant upon those who can help in any way, big or small.

Peter, I know we can do it again. If you are able to contribute $5 or $10, Joe Biden will have the resources he needs to take on Donald Trump and restore humanity, dignity and leadership to the White House.

**Joe 's end-of-month deadline is only one day away, and I know he is counting on all of our help and support. So can you chip in today?** | If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

For me and so many of us, this election is the most important of our lifetime. It feels as if everything is at stake and on the line.

As a woman, mother and business owner, I need to believe our country can be a place where everyone has access to affordable health care and fair wages, and can trust in leadership that protects our soldiers in the field, our students in school and our workers no matter where they contribute to our workforce, from meatpacking to small business owners to those working in health care. I need to believe that every single person in this country, regardless of your zipcode, has a genuine shot at success.

With Joe Biden in the White House, I know America can be that place. But he needs all our help to get there.

**That 's why I wanted to take the time to write to you today, Peter. I am dedicating myself to whatever is required and I hope you will join me in offering $5 before Joe Biden's end-of-month deadline?**

Peter, thank you so much for supporting Joe Biden's Presidential campaign.

[ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b9c7/1cd0ac28/1781991cb/357d2ab5/2552953654/VEsEBA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_footer&refcode=email-bsd-20190515host-b20_FDR_states_NA-F1_S1_C1")

This isn't the time to be complacent. If you are ready to fight for the soul of this nation, you can start by donating to elect Joe Biden by clicking the button below.

| [DONATE TO ELECT JOE BIDEN »](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b9c7/1cd0ac28/1781991cb/357d2ab4/2552953654/VEsEBw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_footer?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2019.08.07_B8_footer_X__F1_S1_C1__footer&amount=25")

We know we send a lot of emails, and we are sorry about that. The reason? We are relying on grassroots supporters like you (we're serious!).

But Peter, we don't want to bother you. If you'd like to only receive our most important emails, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b9c7/1cd0ac28/1781991cb/357d2ab7/2552953654/VEsEBg/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/less-emails"). To make a contribution by mail, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b9c7/1cd0ac28/1781991cb/357d2ab2/2552953654/VEsEAw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://joebiden.com/contribute-by-mail/") for instructions.

We sincerely thank you for your help and support.
\- The entire Joe Biden for President team

name: Team MJ Hegar
subject: We've seen enough
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
It's time to flip the Senate.

|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891eb0/7f51f7bc/401fe19c/4ef7a1da/1250190924/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | | [](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891eb0/7f51f7bc/401fe19c/4ef7a1d9/1250190924/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MTEifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-JulyEOM?refcode=email_20200730.3nd__1811__&amount=10")
---
For years, we've seen good legislation pile up on Mitch McConnell's desk as he refuses to take action to protect our health care, lower the cost of prescription medicine, and protect our communities from gun violence. For years, we've seen Sen. Cornyn prioritize Big Pharma, the insurance industry, and the gun lobby over regular Texans. **Peter, we 've seen _enough!_**

Flipping the Senate in November means leaders like MJ will be able to get stuff _done_. It means we'll be able to take action on so many bills that Texans support -- but that Sen. Cornyn's big-money donors tell him to block.

**But to win in November and see MJ flip the Senate, we need to reach millions of undecided voters.[Will you make a MATCHED donation before tomorrow's midnight deadline to help us reach our first end-of-month goal of the general election?](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891eb0/7f51f7bc/401fe19c/4ef7a1d9/1250190924/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MTEifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-JulyEOM?refcode=email_20200730.3nd__1811__&amount=10")**

\-- Team MJ

**[DONATE](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891eb0/7f51f7bc/401fe19c/4ef7a1d9/1250190924/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MTEifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-JulyEOM?refcode=email_20200730.3nd__1811__&amount=10")**

|
---

| It's clear we need a real leader for Texas and a Senate that prioritizes our health care. **[More than ever, we're relying on online fundraising to keep building the campaign we need to win in November, and we greatly appreciate your continued support>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891eb0/7f51f7bc/401fe19c/4ef7a1d8/1250190924/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MTEifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-covidfooter?refcode=1811&amount=10")**

However, we know this is not an easy time for many. If you'd like to pause receiving fundraising emails for the next few weeks, **[please let us know here](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891eb0/7f51f7bc/401fe19c/4ef7a1df/1250190924/VEsA/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/s/mj-covid-fewer-emails")**. We'll still keep in touch with important information and to ask your thoughts from time to time.

Flipping the Senate in November means leaders like MJ will be able to get stuff done. It means we'll be able to take action on so many bills that Texans support -- but that Sen. Cornyn's big-money donors tell him to block. But to win in November and see MJ flip the Senate, we need to reach millions of undecided voters. "" \-- Team MJ "" | | It's clear we need a real leader for Texas and a Senate that prioritizes our health care. "" However, we know this is not an easy time for many. If you'd like to pause receiving fundraising emails for the next few weeks, "". We'll still keep in touch with important information and to ask your thoughts from time to time. MJ Hegar was a member of the US Air Force and the Air National Guard. name: Team Manny
subject: Federalist: Romney’s man Bill Hagerty coming to the Senate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Manny for Senate, All rights reserved
body:
This article is absolutely devastating for Bill Hagerty
[](https://mannysethi.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jkhrhilt-ojdkijhkdh-y/)
---
| |
---|---|---
| Friend,

**All we can say is WOW - this article from the Federalist absolutely nails what’s at stake in our primary this week:** [](https://mannysethi.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jkhrhilt-ojdkijhkdh-j/) [READ THE ARTICLE](https://mannysethi.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jkhrhilt-ojdkijhkdh-t/) And the whole article is just as dead-on as the title:

_"A number of months ago, outgoing Tennessee Sen. Lamar Alexander shepherded [Hagerty] around the Senate Republican lunch, introducing him to attendees. As Hagerty turned to leave, he assured the room “I’m on the team.” Upon returning to his office, one conservative senator reportedly asked his staff, “Who the f— was that guy?”

“I’m on the team” is a message Republican leadership, including Senate Majority Leader Mitch McConnell, likes to hear. McConnell was an early endorser of Hagerty, and has been joined by the Chamber of Commerce, a pro-corporate organization generally aligned against the base and sometimes against the president. Conservative base favorites like Sens. Rand Paul and Ted Cruz, radio host Mark Levin, and former Sen. Jim DeMint, however, have endorsed Hagerty’s opponent, Dr. Manny Sethi."_

**[Click here to read the full article.](https://mannysethi.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jkhrhilt-ojdkijhkdh-i/)** It’s the single best explanation of what’s really happening behind the scenes in our race.

We’ve only got a few days left. **Please, send this article to every friend or family member you know who is currently undecided in this race.**

Thank you for your support,
Team Manny Copyright © 2020 Paid for by Dr. Manny for Senate, All rights reserved.
Our mailing address is:
PO Box 58068, Nashville, TN 37205 |

name: Melissa Hortman
subject: Re: Trump
disclaimer_text: paid for by the DFL House Caucus
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/sRNf3MAsWu3HswZhw1nr_NK29FUarOfDtNG1HDZNB_o=/RQB32GcHAuzvLlbfo-6FlifLkdBeejQO74e2SI6ZHUc=?refcode=073120am)
| | Friend, I wanted to follow up with you on the last email from our team. This is the most critical fundraising time for our campaign. The money we raise right now decides our strategic choices going forward. With less than 100 days ago, it's crunch time. Would you help us reach our July goal? [**_Click here to make a contribution._**](https://act.myngp.com/el/sRNf3MAsWu3HswZhw1nr_NK29FUarOfDtNG1HDZNB_o=/RQB32GcHAuzvLlbfo-6FlifLkdBeejQO74e2SI6ZHUc=?refcode=073120am) Trump is investing big in Minnesota, and we need to do the same. Now is the time for us to come together, rally around our shared values, and build a better future for all Minnesotans, no exceptions. It has never been more important to protect and expand our majority in the Minnesota House of Representatives.
Thank you, **Melissa Hortman** Speaker Minnesota House of Representatives \-------- Original Message --------
If you've watched TV or been on your phone anytime in the last month, you'll know exactly what we're talking about. Donald Trump is investing BIG in Minnesota this election cycle. It is clear by his advertising spends that the Trump campaign thinks they can win Minnesota. That means that if we don't get moving soon, Republican disinformation will be clogging all of the airwaves from now until November. **Will you invest in our campaign today to fight back against the Republican politics of hate and division?**
_If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately_ [**Invest $15**](https://act.myngp.com/el/sRNf3MAsWu3HswZhw1nr_NK29FUarOfDtNG1HDZNB_o=/RQB32GcHAuzvLlbfo-6FlifLkdBeejQO74e2SI6ZHUc=?express_lane=true&amount=15&refcode=073120am) [**Invest $25**](https://act.myngp.com/el/sRNf3MAsWu3HswZhw1nr_NK29FUarOfDtNG1HDZNB_o=/RQB32GcHAuzvLlbfo-6FlifLkdBeejQO74e2SI6ZHUc=?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=073120am) [**Invest $50**](https://act.myngp.com/el/sRNf3MAsWu3HswZhw1nr_NK29FUarOfDtNG1HDZNB_o=/RQB32GcHAuzvLlbfo-6FlifLkdBeejQO74e2SI6ZHUc=?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=073120am) [**Invest $100**](https://act.myngp.com/el/sRNf3MAsWu3HswZhw1nr_NK29FUarOfDtNG1HDZNB_o=/RQB32GcHAuzvLlbfo-6FlifLkdBeejQO74e2SI6ZHUc=?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=073120am) [**Or, another amount**](https://act.myngp.com/el/sRNf3MAsWu3HswZhw1nr_NK29FUarOfDtNG1HDZNB_o=/RQB32GcHAuzvLlbfo-6FlifLkdBeejQO74e2SI6ZHUc=?express_lane_other=true&refcode=073120am) This election is critical. Control of the legislature means an ability to pass legislation that will build a better future for all Minnesotans. We can't do it without you. Thank you for your support, House DFL Team [**_P.S. Minnesota residents can donate $50 (or $100 per couple) per year and it will be refunded by the state._**](https://act.myngp.com/el/sRNf3MAsWu3HswZhw1nr_NK29FUarOfDtNG1HDZNB_o=/RQB32GcHAuzvLlbfo-6FlifLkdBeejQO74e2SI6ZHUc=?refcode=073120am) [**Donate**](https://act.myngp.com/el/sRNf3MAsWu3HswZhw1nr_NK29FUarOfDtNG1HDZNB_o=/RQB32GcHAuzvLlbfo-6FlifLkdBeejQO74e2SI6ZHUc=?refcode=073120am)

name: Terry Neese
subject: Staying on the rails...
body:
DEADLINE THIS FRIDAY Dear Friend,This is our LAST monthly goal before the August runoff election. We're so close to meeting our goal... will YOU be the one to put us over the top? [Meet Our Goal - $20](https://terryneese.cmail20.com/t/t-l-pddkkyd-elutjhyju-r/) [Meet Our Goal - $50](https://terryneese.cmail20.com/t/t-l-pddkkyd-elutjhyju-y/) [Meet Our Goal - $100](https://terryneese.cmail20.com/t/t-l-pddkkyd-elutjhyju-t/) We're approaching the finish line in this election, but we need to hit our July fundraising goal to make sure we can execute our Get-Out-The-Vote and Election Day programs... to deliver a WIN in this critical runoff election!If we fall short, we have to make some hard decisions about what gets cut. Voter turnout? Last-minute volunteer programs? Fighting back against last-minute attacks?There's a lot at stake in this election: the right to life, the Second Amendment, securing the border, and unleashing our economy. But the clock is ticking.Are you with us? [Unsubscribe](https://terryneese.cmail20.com/t/t-u-pddkkyd-elutjhyju-i/)
---

I just got the latest update on our online fundraising numbers from our Deputy Finance Director, Alexis. I was getting ready to forward this to Eugene but thought I’d check in and see if there’s any way you could help put us over the edge.

**As of right now, we’re $4,181 short with just a few hours to spare. name: Coalition for American Veterans
subject: Veterans Speak Out at Rally at Tomah VA
body:
2020 Election is Crucial for Veterans
| [ ](https://hs-6023921.t.hubspotstarter-ir.net/e2t/tc/VV-lCX6XlhzmW6xj8jV4b9SL2W5XFwz14d9GpMN861Kzt3lGmQV1-WJV7CgZGcW2hzzfP4YF_-kN6gDQGZDCnx8W8zv8Xx2hXYGyW1n-hlb99gZBSN5wRf9TtWTX0W1LKrn75WnxP6W7cd1Bt45fvy5M_7BZXqc1wFW8yP9lJ2j9c_rW4_s0TV4NrTkwW2mgMrV2jk0wWW5nwLbL75BNcvW3nDj_249wHRqW4bThKG66fP9RV2-M6R1HDHnLW9gw1y69crxBkVz04Tc6-QtskW6cBGwR8ZTy6RN71J9m_LSDcRW2zYW_v32v9c7W4DxGG53nBxPFW9j1R058Lwp3r3mdP1)
---
|
---
Hey Peter, Veterans and their supporters gathered at the Tomah VA Medical Center this past week to shine a light on the scandal that erupted in 2014, during the Obama-Biden administration, when veterans began overdosing on prescribed medications. At the rally, Veterans and their supporters heard **retired Navy SEAL Derrick Van Orden** speak about VA reform, holding politicians accountable, and electing politicians who support the concerns of veterans. And **Veteran Dan Kapanke** , who served in the U.S. Marine Corps Reserve, explained how grassroots politics can maximize influence on the 2020 Election.
---
---
**Yes, thanks to you and your support, Veterans's voices are being heard and making an impact. **As the November 3rd election approaches, Coalition for American Veterans is conducting a grassroots outreach effort to stand up for Veterans’ issues via videos, rallies, telephone townhalls, social media, phone calls, mailings, text messages, email alerts, and literature distribution. The Tomah VA Medical Center has seen a dramatic change since Obama and Biden left office. **We don’t want to return to the Obama-Biden policies of neglect, disrespect, and mistreatment of Veterans.** Thanks for your support! Say "NO" to Joe Biden! **P.S.: Make a difference in 2020 - Join us now with a[donation of $35](https://hs-6023921.t.hubspotstarter-ir.net/e2t/tc/VV-lCX6XlhzmW6xj8jV4b9SL2W5XFwz14d9GpMN861KzN3lGn5V1-WJV7CgBmhW8x-YMR29M5xCW74K4rw5j1Q_lN4kp90ST7wCJW7ZlH056p4wZXW3_kRhq4PTws0N1ls1NXHfNPGW24MRRD6279cSW8BrJxS4WbpFtV61SJs2MP1kbW2J0npf1-RSvYW2lKrKc7xscd4W5-Z-xs258nTvW5MpfbY5Brt-bW6b5L284ksqXNW1YlL6y2CXkSpW39ShxH87T9lZVfVpkV43DNtjW8BCNTG7xzphlW2cVRS0804F8PW3PfK4D6RtRTtN2l5M4PPs2ZbN3X4M6Fcy5CQW9jllkR3W4cm_V9nRDq3yMvTQ3hHk1).**
---

---
## **About Coalition for American Veterans**
[Coalition for American Veterans](https://hs-6023921.t.hubspotstarter-ir.net/e2t/tc/VV-lCX6XlhzmW6xj8jV4b9SL2W5XFwz14d9GpMN861Kzt3lGmQV1-WJV7CgQ7DW3fqQ7t2fx5hxW55nJ8l2SVYkLW8CPZSx8pMjLFN8cDl52lfdd8W8hsZf71yCww9W97mc--4cM23gW72q2_K1M6-v8W41t-lF7c5NqFW5_XZN77QJndtW5vZV9-2gHLm8W7Ny89p441JgpVVP9bn1Vn_2qW8BykqC7C5tdGW77F5RJ3Vd5HWW59W49v31S1r6W7c-52x7dW9yCW6Rhvbt6v94R3W4S9kBf6xpcx2W7r7LBF77vCdPN48Cs_JYr0F7VDqp0r3fqF5GW5_Z9mJ61jsXk3kJ91) was founded by a group of citizens concerned with the treatment our veterans have received since returning from duty, going months and years without seeing their families and risking their lives, only to come home to politicians that do not support them.

name: Jon Ossoff (personal)
subject: Friend! I need you now
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JON OSSOFF FOR SENATE
body:
the deadline is tonight |
---
Hi friend,

I'll be very direct -- our end-of-month fundraising deadline is just hours away, and I need you now more than ever.

**We knew our $100,000 goal was ambitious, but the massive sums of GOP money coming in against me are truly astonishing. We have to be bold to win. And I have faith this team of supporters will get us over the top by midnight.**

**[So, friend, I'm asking you to click the button below and donate $10 right now.](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e21b3/5b2c1286/3e0a40a3/25f11ba1/1389496994/VEsH/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_07_31_jo_eom?refcode=em_2020_07_31_jo_eom&amount=10")** | | [Chip in $10 immediately >>](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e21b3/5b2c1286/3e0a40a3/25f11ba1/1389496994/VEsE/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_07_31_jo_eom?refcode=em_2020_07_31_jo_eom&amount=10")
---
Here's the situation:

**We've had a monumental month.**

**The Cook Political Report upgraded our race to a "TOSS-UP," and the polls show us NECK AND NECK with David Perdue.**

**But now the GOP is panicking. And when they panic, they spend big and stoop low.**

**They're dumping in eye-popping amounts of cash to attack me. My opponent even doctored a photo of my face in one of his ads in an obvious and outrageous anti-Semitic attack.**

We've got them on the ropes, but they're playing dirty.

So I need your help. To stay on offense. To overwhelm my opponent's dark money and bigotry with overwhelming grassroots power.

**[So Friend: Right now, before the clock strikes 12, I need your help. Our future is on the line.](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e21b3/5b2c1286/3e0a40a3/25f11ba0/1389496994/VEsF/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_07_31_jo_eom?refcode=em_2020_07_31_jo_eom")**

name: Amy Kennedy
subject: Tonight
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Amy Kennedy for Congress
body:
|
#
Hello, Tonight is our first major fundraising deadline since winning New Jersey’s primary. It’s a big test of our campaign’s strength. The money we raise right now will be put to work right away building a campaign that will turn out voters across South Jersey and defeat Congressman Jeff Van Drew this fall. **But there’s another number I’ll be looking for when I get our July report tomorrow morning: the number of people who have donated to our campaign.** That’s because it’s going to take a real movement to win this race. We simply can’t do it alone. body:
“The people pay taxes to have fair and open elections. They deserve to have their votes counted. Their voices will not be silenced,” Singh said. | | | Dear Friend,

Do you remember what I told you when we first embarked on our journey to restore New Jersey and save America?

I told you that the closer we came to victory, the more terrified and desperate our opposition would become.

## They are throwing _everything_ at us right now.

We are literally inches from the finish line, neck-and-neck with a RINO Democrat, and the establishment is doing everything they can to resist our victory. Let's secure our win now.

Check out my team's press release to see what we're doing to ensure a fair and honest election. In spite of Phil Murphy and AG Grewal's machinations, we've managed to stay ahead of the fight because of contributions from patriots like you.

I can't do this alone. I need your [financial support today](https://hirshsingh.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=978b8670b44783121d15ac87e&id=94aeb55d5c&e=3e017fab0f) to ensure we can implement a statewide recount. We are combating the Attorney General on every front and need your financial support to ensure victory:
---
| [DEMAND RECOUNT NOW](https://hirshsingh.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=978b8670b44783121d15ac87e&id=3e8110fea2&e=3e017fab0f "DEMAND RECOUNT NOW")
---
| This election will set the stage for future elections in America. We cannot afford to let it fall into the hands of the radical left. They are scared of losing their power — and they should be. With your help, we'll make sure their time is up.

-Hirsh
---
| | [ ](https://hirshsingh.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=978b8670b44783121d15ac87e&id=32a1c5093b&e=3e017fab0f)
---

---
| July 30th, 2020
**FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE**
Contact: [press@hirshsingh.com](mailto:press@hirshsingh.com?subject=RE%3A%2011-09-19%20Press%20Release)
---
| |
# With Tens of Thousands of Ballots Unaccounted for, Hirsh Singh Demands a Recount

**LINWOOD, NJ** — With over 40,000 ballots not yet reported and over 27,000 ballots known to have been thrown away and not counted, Republican U.S. Senate candidate Hirsh Singh has filed for recounts in all 21 New Jersey counties.

Singh has announced he is seeking a recount in the still-uncertified U.S. Senate race more than three weeks after the Primary Election took place.

“The people pay taxes to have fair and open elections. They deserve to have their votes counted. Their voices will not be silenced,” Singh said.

"This election is replete with disparities, discrepancies, and irregularities," said Singh, who has been fighting to receive information on the number of basic votes and other pertinent election data from each of New Jersey’s 21 counties since July 7th, the date of the Primary Election.

Singh said so far, judges in four counties have signed orders authorizing recounts to commence while hearings are set to be held in four more counties today.

"Phil Murphy has caused chaos, concern, and confusion that Vladimir Putin and the Chinese Communist Party could only dream of," Singh said. “Tens of thousands of voters have been disenfranchised as a result of his mandatory vote-by-mail scheme, and he and his cronies in Trenton seem content to normalize these deficiencies and erode our tradition of holding fair, open, and honest elections. Not on my watch."

In seeking recounts in each of the 21 counties, Singh has cited a multitude of troubling issues:
* Ballots postmarked July 8th were improperly counted and/or separated from ballots postmarked on July 7th; the deadline by which all vote-by-mail ballots were to be accepted
* Ballots marked with a clear intention by the voter but that were unable to be read by vote-counting machines
* Ballots thrown out for minor matters such as stray markings
* Ballots thrown out for lack of response to "cure" letters; a process that is wholly unfamiliar to voters
* Ballots counted in secret, without campaign challengers having the benefit of being present for the process
* Ballots found in unsealed bags without chain-of-custody history
* Ballots rejected for unspecified/unreported reasons

Singh said the circumstances surrounding this election are unprecedented. He could think of no other election in recent memory where tens of thousands of voters were disenfranchised, and where a candidate seeking basic information on his election was illegally denied that information or ignored by elections officials.

"This would never happen in a regular New Jersey election, Singh said. "Would tens of thousands of people be told in traditional polling places like firehouses, gymnasiums or community centers across the state, ‘Sorry, but your vote doesn't count this year?'

"The people wouldn't stand for it. The people would outright reject it. But Phil Murphy and his team of lackeys in the Attorney General's Office think they can trick the people of NJ because the election was conducted by mail."

Singh said that if the votes from this unprecedented Primary Election are not properly and transparently counted across the state, Murphy and his minions would try to get away with even more shenanigans this November.
---
| ###
For any inquiries, please reply to this message or send an email to: [press@hirshsingh.com](mailto:press@hirshsingh.com?subject=RE%3A%2011-09-19%20Press%20Release)

Additional information is available on our [official website](https://hirshsingh.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=978b8670b44783121d15ac87e&id=025e03cd3f&e=3e017fab0f) and [Facebook](https://hirshsingh.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=978b8670b44783121d15ac87e&id=b99334465a&e=3e017fab0f) page.

Thank you,
**The Singh for Senate Press Team**
_For the People_

subject: This is AMAZING news!

body:

Friend,

I'm running against unelected Sen. Kelly Loeffler (R-GA) for U.S. Senate, and I need your help: While my opponent is a former Wall Street exec who has cashed in on her public office and been accused of insider trading, I'm a pastor who's devoted my life to service. I'm running for Senate to stand up to corrupt leaders like Mitch McConnell and restore moral leadership to our government.
_The Washington Post _says winning this race is the key to Democrats taking back the Senate. Right now, we're running neck-and-neck with our opponent - but while she's spending $20 million of her personal fortune to buy this seat, we're running a people-powered campaign that depends on grassroots support. **And unfortunately, at this critical moment, we're falling incredibly short of our July goal.**
That's why this news is so amazing: **Our group of fired-up donors has upped their offer and will triple match every single donation, dollar for dollar, to help us get back on track - but only until midnight tonight.** [Please, will you give $5 or more now to help us flip Georgia blue, take back the Senate for Democrats and restore moral leadership to our government? When you give right now, your contribution will go _three times_ as far.](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.com/page/m/60b3e23a/288179be/90c8dbd/348e0bbb/708273865/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoid2Fybm9jay1mb3ItZ2VvcmdpYV9lbWFpbCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoianRrNDczLWZyLW5kLSIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiI1LDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAsNTAwIiwiZTNzZ1lXSnlaV04xY25KcGJtY2dmWDA9IjoiIn0%3D/?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/warnock-for-georgia_email?refcode=jtk473-fr-nd-&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")****
The fact that McConnell is lining up the full force of the GOP establishment to keep this seat red proves one thing, and one thing only: He's _terrified_ that his Senate majority is in _serious_ danger.
But here's the deal: Despite unprecedented support for our campaign, my opponent has outraised us by writing herself a staggering $10 million check - and you can bet there's plenty more where that came from.
In a race this close, falling short of our end-of-month goal isn't an option - and failing to take advantage of this rare match opportunity could mean handing Senate control to Mitch McConnell for another two years.
**Nate Silver 's FiveThirtyEight says Democrats can take back the Senate - but we _have_ ****to win in Georgia.** So if you care about flipping Georgia blue, ending Mitch McConnell's Senate majority and restoring moral leadership to our government, I'm counting on you******to rush your immediate grassroots support before our critical triple-match expires: **
**[Please, friend: Give $5 or more ($5 becomes $15)- before tonight's midnight deadline - to have every dollar TRIPLED so we can flip Georgia blue and take back the Senate for Democrats. ](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.com/page/m/60b3e23a/288179be/90c8dbd/348e0bbb/708273865/VEsE/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoid2Fybm9jay1mb3ItZ2VvcmdpYV9lbWFpbCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoianRrNDczLWZyLW5kLSIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiI1LDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAsNTAwIiwiZTNzZ1lXSnlaV04xY25KcGJtY2dmWDA9IjoiIn0%3D/?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/warnock-for-georgia_email?refcode=jtk473-fr-nd-&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")**
Thank you for coming through when it matters most. I appreciate your support.

Reverend Warnock
|
---
| Reverend Raphael Warnock is running for Senate to expand access to health care, defend the dignity of working people and fight voter suppression. Please, pitch in now to elect Reverend Warnock and flip Georgia blue! | | | [Contribute](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.com/page/m/60b3e23a/288179be/90c8dbd/348e0bbb/708273865/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoid2Fybm9jay1mb3ItZ2VvcmdpYV9lbWFpbCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoianRrNDczLWZyLW5kLSIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiI1LDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAsNTAwIiwiZTNzZ1lXSnlaV04xY25KcGJtY2dmWDA9IjoiIn0%3D/?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/warnock-for-georgia_email?refcode=jtk473-fr-nd-&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")

subject: Tonight's deadline
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/5e95bafdfb48/tonights-deadline?e=140a9b81e7)
---
| |
---
| | At the beginning of this month, we set a goal of breaking the record for individual contributions that we set last month, and we are so close to accomplishing just that. **We need 132 contributions between now and midnight tonight to hit our goal.**
---
| [Click here to help us reach our goal!](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=870c06988e&e=140a9b81e7 "Click here to help us reach our goal!")
---
| If we hit this goal, we'll be able to fund our digital outreach strategy that is more important now than it has ever been. With only 95 days until the final votes are cast, we need to make sure that every voter in the 16th district hears our message.

My opponent has spent the last few months defending Donald Trump's response to the COVID-19 pandemic and condemning protestors who are standing up for racial justice. **The people of IL-16 deserve better representation, and you can help give it to them. **

**Your contribution will make sure that we are able to fully execute our strategy that we know can lead us to victory.** Every donation you make helps us make phone calls, send texts, and engage with voters online. We know what it is going to take to win, and we need your help to get us there.

Dani Brzozowski
Democratic Nominee for Congress, IL-16

---
| [Donate Here](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=f5ee74fe14&e=140a9b81e7 "Donate Here")

name: Jake Duesenberg
subject: Important Message
body:
| [ ](http://www.action4liberty.com/?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=sneak_peak_retarget&n=1)
---
Peter \-- Picture this... Our economy tanks. Your favorite restaurants and businesses close for good. Distance learning for young children has to be juggled with trying to earn a living for your family. These are the gloomy realities we're experiencing in Tim Walz' "One Minnesota". That's why Action 4 Liberty has led the effort against Governor Walz' Unilateral Emergency Powers. **Here's a Recap of our Efforts:**
* **April 14 - only 15 Republicans voted with us**
* **April 28 - after weeks of pressuring House Republicans, we got all 59 to vote with us**
* **June 13 - after pressuring the Senate Republicans, we got them to pass the Resolution and we got 61 votes in the House with 2 Democrats**
* **July 14 - we got 63 votes in the House with 4 Democrats joining us**

Remember, we need 68 votes on the Resolution in the Minnesota House to finally End Walz' Powers. **So, we're merely FIVE DEMOCRATS AWAY from ending Walz' emergency powers once and for all!** I want to give you a sneak peak of the commercial we'll be launching in several districts throughout Minnesota, targeting vulnerable Democrats. It's time to **turn up the heat**! [](http://www.action4liberty.com/end_walz_tabke_commercial?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=sneak_peak_retarget&n=2) Walz has completely abused his emergency powers to infringe on our civil liberties and shut down our favorite businesses. Now he's forcing YOU to wear a mask. And later today, he's likely to do the Teacher's Union a favor and keep our schools closed this fall. **Governor Walz is power hungry. Allowing one person to make rules that govern free people is the most un-American ideal that exists. He MUST BE STOPPED!**
## [HELP US TURN UP THE HEAT](https://action4liberty.nationbuilder.com/donate?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=sneak_peak_retarget&n=3)
The Legislature will be back in session in two weeks and we're ready to **turn up the heat** on the remaining Democrats needed to End Walz' Emergency Powers. We have a shot at finally stopping Walz in his tracks!
### **Action 4 Liberty is going to run commercials like this one of Rep Jeff Brand PLUS six other districts of Democrats who are most vulnerable in the November election.**
[](http://www.action4liberty.com/end_walz_brand_commercial?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=sneak_peak_retarget&n=4) Help us get these commercials out to tens of thousands of voters in these districts by donating today. | [](https://action4liberty.nationbuilder.com/donate?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=sneak_peak_retarget&n=5 "DONATE") [DONATE](https://action4liberty.nationbuilder.com/donate?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=sneak_peak_retarget&n=6)
---
We must **turn up the heat** on these Democrats to stop protecting Walz! Who knows what next week has in store for our suffering state under Walz' failed leadership.
[**Only with your support of funding these commercials, other cutting edge digitals, mail and all your activism can we make this a reality. Pitch in $100 NOW if you can. If that's too much, help us out with $50 or $25. Or get us a lot of air play with a generous donation of $1,000.**](https://action4liberty.nationbuilder.com/donate?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=sneak_peak_retarget&n=7)
**In Liberty,

**
**Jake Duesenberg**
**President, Action 4 Liberty**
Action 4 Liberty · United States
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](http://www.action4liberty.com/unsubscribe?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=sneak_peak_retarget&n=8).
You can also keep up with Jake Duesenberg on [Facebook](http://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6nyVoJL5zCIi1gu8lCoYmQrA8P7rhuOjJmdy-IRmglie&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=sneak_peak_retarget&n=9).
Created with [NationBuilder](http://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=SWqLExi-4iBlEOa5qgO58jA2d62deOsOLwOgchKDecY&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=sneak_peak_retarget&n=10), software for leaders.

name: Jason Yates
subject: Introducing Our Church Votes – New Initiative
body:
Thank you for helping us champion biblical values from the pew to the voting booth
Peter,
Because of your generosity with your time, financial support, and prayers, we are awakening Christians to bring their faith forward into the voting booth and the public square across the country.
As you know, more than 25 million Christians in America chose not to vote in presidential election. That’s a huge missed opportunity to see biblical values reflected in our nation’s leadership and advanced in our communities.
Our faith votes, whether we cast a ballot or not.
One of our key “centers of influence” is churches. So we’ve launched [Our Church Votes](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=0o6-ZyWYta_wz9vMcHAteQfaEmlrz6H8ZSMcq7BWnkA&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200731com01&n=1) \- a catalyst for helping individual believers and churches equip their congregations this election season, so that we can ensure biblical values are championed from the pew to the voting booth.
Take a look at our [Church Resource Center](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=0o6-ZyWYta_wz9vMcHAteWDGXd_TIHLyobMAk2pvAfAp-3Tws9PqjtmzQngmslso&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200731com01&n=2) where we have free resources from pastors and downloads for churches to use so that they can easily participate in Voter Registration Sunday and equip their congregation to stand for God’s truth. And Fox News wrote a great article on our brand-new initiative that you can read [here](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=KVYzWTFUuJ0SsyVZLAg-7ER5tuZG2gAxhFb8PG8WMjDLA45v7zQw7pC20FH5s89LaVa6uSPF1FvmztdJli-Sf_3xxPEc7lCLDC02x7Uo7oA&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200731com01&n=3).
Our vision is to resource churches to engage Christians to pray, think biblically, and go vote. We have put together all of the non-partisan voting materials for churches, but now is when we need your help. There is no one better to reach your pastor or your church community than you!
Will you help encourage and equip those in your church to vote? Visit Our Church Votes to get everything you need. Even if your church is meeting virtually, we have tremendous online resources.
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=bp8rcbhcZgxOse_afDw0stOKFj1ybvRwxp-XJytnFrA&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200731com01&n=4)
I encourage you to share this resource with others who would like to join us on this mission to engage the church to stand courageously for biblical values in our country.
Together, we pray. Together, we vote. Together, we shape the future of our nation. Thank you for your support that makes this possible!
Standing with you,
Jason Yates
CEO
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=FvZODUdzRCV4_QVEoUI5Y_LYDGbWPUdf00keax2EMv8&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200731com01&n=5)
P.S. Please continue to pray for My Faith Votes, especially the [Our Church Votes](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=0o6-ZyWYta_wz9vMcHAteQfaEmlrz6H8ZSMcq7BWnkA&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200731com01&n=6) initiative. We believe that when we unite together in prayer, we can change the future of our nation.
©2020 My Faith Votes
10940 S Parker Rd, #640, Parker, CO 80134
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com).
To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/unsubscribe?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200731com01&n=7).

name: Joe Biden
subject: My event with Elizabeth Warren tonight
body:
As you've probably heard, Elizabeth Warren will be joining me tonight at 7:30 pm eastern for a grassroots fundraising event. |
---
Peter,

As you've probably heard, Elizabeth Warren will be joining me tonight at 7:30 pm eastern for a grassroots fundraising event.

**This is an exciting event for me, Peter.** Elizabeth pioneered groundbreaking ways to engage grassroots supporters during her campaign, and I know we both miss speaking directly with voters on the campaign trail. It's not often that I get to speak with both her and grassroots supporters together, so I've got to be honest: I'm really looking forward to this event.

But there's something else important happening today, and that's our end-of-month fundraising deadline. This morning, I looked at a list of RSVPs for this fundraiser, and I noticed that we're close -- but not all the way there -- to the number of supporters attending that will guarantee we hit our $8 million goal before midnight.

[**I have faith we 'll reach this goal, but we need a few more contributions to make it happen. That's why I'm reaching out to you, Peter.**](https://go.joebiden.%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/bvf2020_fr_warrengrassrootsfr?refcode=JB_EM_VF_2020.07.31_B1_JRB-EW-GRFR-FINALDAY_X__F1_S2_C1__full&amount=35&amounts=10,35,50,100&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_VF_2020.07.31_B1_JRB-EW-GRFR-FINALDAY_X__F1_S2_C1__full")

[**We 've still got some more space at tonight's event, and frankly, it won't be the same without you, Peter. So if you're free at 7:30 pm eastern tonight, and can afford a contribution of $5 or any amount that works for your budget right now, I hope you'll chip in to join us and make sure we meet our midnight fundraising goal.**](https://go.joebiden.%3D%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/bvf2020_fr_warrengrassrootsfr?refcode=JB_EM_VF_2020.07.31_B1_JRB-EW-GRFR-FINALDAY_X__F1_S2_C1__full&amount=5&amounts=10,35,50,100&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_VF_2020.07.31_B1_JRB-EW-GRFR-FINALDAY_X__F1_S2_C1__full") | **Name:** Peter Willis
**Attending Tonight 's Grassroots Fundraiser?** No, no RSVP yet!
**Progress to Midnight Fundraising Goal:** 85%
**Suggested Action:[Chip in $5 or any amount you can afford today to help us beat our goal and make tonight's event a huge success »](https://go.joebiden.%3D%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/bvf2020_fr_warrengrassrootsfr?refcode=JB_EM_VF_2020.07.31_B1_JRB-EW-GRFR-FINALDAY_X__F1_S2_C1__full&amount=5&amounts=10,35,50,100&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_VF_2020.07.31_B1_JRB-EW-GRFR-FINALDAY_X__F1_S2_C1__full")**
---

If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

---
Grassroots supporters like you are the true backbone of this campaign, I really mean it. Nearly all our contributions come from grassroots donors, and I'm so thankful for that.

I can't wait for tonight's event, where I'll get to join Elizabeth Warren and celebrate all the hard work that good folks like you are doing to make sure we win this battle for the soul of the nation.

I hope I'll see you there,

_Joe_

**P.S.** If you have already bought your ticket -- thank you! You can find your link to access the event in your donation receipt. If you haven't, make sure to RSVP before 7:30 pm: [**https://go.joebiden.com/Elizabeth-Warren-Grassroots-Fundraiser**](https://go.joebiden.%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/bvf2020_fr_warrengrassrootsfr?refcode=JB_EM_VF_2020.07.31_B1_JRB-EW-GRFR-FINALDAY_X__F1_S2_C1__full&amount=35&amounts=10,35,50,100&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_VF_2020.07.31_B1_JRB-EW-GRFR-FINALDAY_X__F1_S2_C1__full")
| | [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b9c2/1cd0ac28/1784d0c67/357d2b11/2068612226/VEsHBw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.facebook.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b9c2/1cd0ac28/1784d0c67/357d2b10/2068612226/VEsHBg/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://twitter.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b9c2/1cd0ac28/1784d0c67/357d2b0f/2068612226/VEsHAQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.youtube.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b9c2/1cd0ac28/1784d0c67/357d2b0e/2068612226/VEsHAA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.instagram.com/joebiden")
---

Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email, with a check, or with a spouse -- thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If we got your name or any information wrong -- we're so sorry! To update and correct your information [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b9c2/1cd0ac28/1784d0c67/357d2b0d/2068612226/VEsHAw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/update-info-bvf"). If you would like to unsubscribe, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b9c2/1cd0ac28/1784d0c67/357d2b0c/2068612226/VEsHAg/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/content/bvf-unsubscribe/").

Peter, thank you so much for supporting Joe Biden and the Democrats.

This isn't the time to be complacent. If you are ready to fight for the soul of this nation, you can start by donating to elect Joe Biden and Democrats up and down the ballot by clicking the button below.

| [DONATE »](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b9c2/1cd0ac28/1784d0c67/357d2b0b/2068612226/VEsHDQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bvf-homepage&refcode=VF_EM_FR_2020.06.16_B8_footer_X__F1_S1_C1__footer?amount=25")
---

We know we send a lot of emails, and we are sorry about that. The reason? We are relying on grassroots supporters like you (we're serious!).

If you'd like to unsubscribe from our emails, you can [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b9c2/1cd0ac28/1784d0c67/357d2b0c/2068612226/VEsHDA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/content/bvf-unsubscribe/").

We sincerely thank you for your help and support.
\- Biden Victory Fund
Paid for by Biden Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by Biden for President, the Democratic National Committee and the State Democratic Parties in these states: AK, AL, AZ, CO, DE, FL, GA, ID, IN, KS, KY, LA, MA, MD, ME, MI, MN, MO, MS, MT, NC, ND, NE, NH, NJ, NM, NV, NY, OH, PA, SC, TN, TX, VA, VT, WI, AND WV.
_Contributions or gifts to Biden Victory Fund are not tax deductible.

The first $5,600/$10,000 from a person/multicandidate committee ("PAC") will be allocated to Biden for President, with the first $2,800/$5,000 designated for the primary and the next $2,800/$5,000 for the general election. For contributions made after the primary, the full amount of the contribution, up to $2,800/$5,000, will be designated for the general election. The next $35,500/$15,000 from a person/PAC will be allocated to the DNC. The next $150,000/$75,000 from a person/PAC will be split equally among the Democratic state parties from: AZ, CO, FL, GA, MI, MN, NC, NE, NH, NV, OH, PA, TX, VA, and WI. The next $110,000/$55,000 from a person/PAC will be split equally among the Democratic state parties from: AL, DE, KS, LA, MA, MD, MS, NJ, NY, VT, and WV. The next $110,000/$55,000 from a person/PAC will be split equally among the Democratic state parties from: AK, ID, IN, KY, ME, MO, MT, ND, NM, SC, and TN. Any additional funds will be allocated to the DNC, subject to applicable contribution limits.

The allocation listed above may change if a contributor designates their contribution for a particular participant(s) or if following it would result in an excessive contribution. Contributions will be used in connection with federal elections, may be spent on any activity as each committee determines in its sole discretion, and will not be earmarked for any particular candidate. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer of individuals whose contributions exceed $200 per election cycle._
clean_body: As you've probably heard, Elizabeth Warren will be joining me tonight at 7:30 pm eastern for a grassroots fundraising event. | Peter, As you've probably heard, Elizabeth Warren will be joining me tonight at 7:30 pm eastern for a grassroots fundraising event. This is an exciting event for me, Peter. Elizabeth pioneered groundbreaking ways to engage grassroots supporters during her campaign, and I know we both miss speaking directly with voters on the campaign trail. It's not often that I get to speak with both her and grassroots supporters together, so I've got to be honest: I'm really looking forward to this event. But there's something else important happening today, and that's our end-of-month fundraising deadline. This morning, I looked at a list of RSVPs for this fundraiser, and I noticed that we're close -- but not all the way there -- to the number of supporters attending that will guarantee we hit our $8 million goal before midnight. "" "" | Name: Peter Willis Attending Tonight 's Grassroots Fundraiser? No, no RSVP yet! Progress to Midnight Fundraising Goal: 85% Suggested Action: "" If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" Grassroots supporters like you are the true backbone of this campaign, I really mean it. Nearly all our contributions come from grassroots donors, and I'm so thankful for that. I can't wait for tonight's event, where I'll get to join Elizabeth Warren and celebrate all the hard work that good folks like you are doing to make sure we win this battle for the soul of the nation. I hope I'll see you there, Joe P.S. If you have already bought your ticket -- thank you! You can find your link to access the event in your donation receipt. If you haven't, make sure to RSVP before 7:30 pm: "" | | "" "" "" "" Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email, with a check, or with a spouse -- thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign.

name: Kat Cammack
subject: We are in the fight of our lives for the soul of our country
body:
I will stop at nothing to stand up to 'The Squad' and their dangerous socialist beliefs
---
| | | | | |
---
| | |
---
| Patriot,
We are in the fight for the soul of our country. It is time that we, the silent majority, speak up against the impending threat of socialism. American life is changing rapidly and we must stand up against the radical Left who are actively implementing socialism in our Nation.
The threat of socialism is growing every day, which is why we must do our due diligence as Republicans to fight for our country's values and instill notions of liberty for generations to come.
They want to take our guns, destroy democracy, and obliterate free thought. Future generations will not live in a free America if we do not stomp out socialism now. It has to stop.
[Click HERE to watch my latest video on this issue](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001HtODTZb8eiBtLja1z5oTkD6IsefqrVXNLr5KRN7R68QjQ9hq9GAH2XMqd789udn_OC4GtrCfRY47hb49nnMjbNbu3AtQ7jthurqnfvvlIfLEOeRTYCWHnCV02ZhRrNkZSfqD-zCwtmUv3rn_Ncf8-g==&c=7qGiLzaUvAtl6lT3BNl2_gpUOMB0B208YhaSeou4Q_J3B8_46rXoJg==&ch=gK4tAnqumW8tRIng2k-MIifj9yMBT0kOanoQSSE8KxWiVoCToqC5lg==)

I will never shy away from a fight to advocate for our conservative beliefs against extremists like Ilhan Omar and AOC. You can be assured that as your next representative, I will proudly stand with President Trump is his efforts to stomp out socialism and protect American freedom.
[If you agree with me that it's time for Republicans to stand up against socialism once and for all, please consider clicking here and contributing to our campaign today.](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001HtODTZb8eiBtLja1z5oTkD6IsefqrVXNLr5KRN7R68QjQ9hq9GAH2SkghQI5dW8NKvEuefUomkF7jWqcIJ_EtGsxEBWS1HlM-Imxppe3dYrMnvoCblo2Kybg7dYuCCAXFsvScgueLbRbuVsN3iQdLyr7LQ_VP5oRb7HQ_WlJUXs=&c=7qGiLzaUvAtl6lT3BNl2_gpUOMB0B208YhaSeou4Q_J3B8_46rXoJg==&ch=gK4tAnqumW8tRIng2k-MIifj9yMBT0kOanoQSSE8KxWiVoCToqC5lg==)

name: Eric Holcomb
subject: re: quick ask
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Eric Holcomb for Indiana
body:
I’m excited about our future, and I can’t wait to work with you for another four years and build One Indiana that delivers the promise | | [](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=bcced0f22abd48688918d05a29f984a0&_e=GtD2KUneNS8WH7xEjtDJGQLxZFsXXzlzWkCBU3Zzh7Sz4w9RCwNRjaZSrmj2H5AStX8H2XIazzdwr9_9343--ZL8EE5hJtiO58XCUKEMAW4WEXJJ7kn1PHSKM9xquCtTwiTpnmLHQT1_OLWYx2g75-aDh0Gkq0ykvzv7bFsUAKW3oE37pGnd_WvamKV9uXB1WgsTcjYkcbbo4pT3F8rqt18xvOx3yIX4OxDneJJOkpUJkzkTyj_lG85jxP9md9eYWcErfFTnnNpZdOV41gSFeA95lHjS-_x65z0Nv-OIlsZWXBAnllFnXizoDluUGkkEpxv5mdrmohBxr-upJiKyCE4xQ_3XxRAmqNzb69-tMuDHx6kdhUY9rcATZ7-eUUyGzfpbHqSrButnir5ZKUWQD62WrdeKgecrVee9h1kBj3N_ToiQxos10Xr83dcFp1GDxKwMBkzojgOs0xDZeDJ3nbwtOCa-GcBlgmtJ1pIHk-A%3D) |
---|---|---
Friend,

The last few months have been challenging — there’s no doubt about it.

But I’ve been amazed by the resiliency and strength that I’ve seen from Hoosiers across our state. We’ve truly come together as One Indiana, and it’s been inspiring to see up close.

**We have a long way to go, but friend, we’re going to come back stronger than ever before. **

I’m excited about our future, and I can’t wait to work with you for another four years and build One Indiana that delivers the promise of the American dream to every Hoosier who wants it.

But I can’t do it alone — I’m going to need your support, and the support of thousands of Hoosiers like you who believe in our mission.

That’s why I’m reaching out and asking you to make an investment in our campaign before the month ends on July 31. If you want to help me keep building One Indiana, make sure we have the resources we need over the next three months of this campaign by donating any amount using the link below.

**[https://secure.holcombforindiana.com/action-1402634/One-Indiana/dpwillis67@gmail.com](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=bcced0f22abd48688918d05a29f984a0&_e=GtD2KUneNS8WH7xEjtDJGQLxZFsXXzlzWkCBU3Zzh7Sz4w9RCwNRjaZSrmj2H5AStX8H2XIazzdwr9_9343--ZL8EE5hJtiO58XCUKEMAW4WEXJJ7kn1PHSKM9xquCtTwiTpnmLHQT1_OLWYx2g75-aDh0Gkq0ykvzv7bFsUAKW3oE37pGnd_WvamKV9uXB1WgsTcjYkcbbo4pT3F8rqt18xvOx3yIX4OxDneJJOkpUJkzkTyj_lG85jxP9md9eYWcErfFTnnNpZdOV41gSFeBXSE_dgSiANA5YcJU2CxoXVoIWZ5yw4G4XBZ0WGhpj_fgzi5HTd-L2a4SVhk0qFRHLUXzA9-CBGlaWwsZEPbH0cTXXprV3uv5qfkUP_Xh0qvIVw60wQrZVlQem_Befd_bD0s6csGEDfWUmiY5k-gfoOA4IRMIpPXkqNNuKg84lEkRz3jOnSx_lyS7Hq2vwgWBgzZ1X0Ea1TlesSHMu28xw%3D)**

Thank you for everything you do.

Regards,

Governor Eric Holcomb
---

name: =?utf-8?B?TGluZGEgU8OhbmNoZXo=?=
subject: It takes a village
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stand with Sánchez
body:
You know the saying that "it takes a village to raise a child?" Well, for millions of American families that village includes child care.
Unfortunately, the economic fallout of COVID-19 has hit essential child care services hard. Affordable and accessible child care was an issue _long_ before this pandemic -- now, it's a national crisis. We **cannot** ask essential workers to continue turning up to work without providing reliable child support.
That's why I'm proud to support the _ Child Care Is Essential Act_ and the _Child Care for Economic Recovery Act._ Together, these bills will help keep child care providers afloat, while easing the financial burden of child care costs and providing essential workers with needed child support.
**[Stand with me in my fight for affordable child care | Make a donation>>](https://act.myngp.com/el/dJoy-yi4xcRS2Z78WQvD1-8P7z7ovFKO3tyu7bJ6Y90=/HpLvJZ4UMk0gaSIvGFWrJwe_0F_b7XBXnTsW3DOMdOg=?refcode=X_073120_EOM_D)**
Safe and affordable child care is not only _necessary _to get our economy back on track -- it's a foundational component to building a _better, more equitable_ economy.
As a mother, as a Latina, and as a former labor lawyer, I know undervalued labor when I see it. For too long, the United States has spent far less on families and children compared to other developed countries. I think it's time that changed.
Right now, I'm running for re-election because I want to keep fighting for policies that will benefit the working families of CA-38. [**Can you help me get my message out by making a contribution to my re-election campaign today?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/dJoy-yi4xcRS2Z78WQvD1-8P7z7ovFKO3tyu7bJ6Y90=/eSBbz-BGybuUC6FrsfBncklW0ZTSacJ2Ekh0daKF_l8=?refcode=X_073120_EOM_D)

\-- _Linda_ _S anchez _

Peter -- Right now we're not quite where we need to be if we're going to reach our end-of-month goal by midnight, and we're coming to you for help.

**Can we count on you to help MJ win this Senate seat?**

subject: Urgent Fundraising Deadline‼
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TROY DOWNING FOR MONTANA
body:
|
---
| |
---
| |
# We Need Your Help Today!
_We are just $527 away from meeting our monthly fundraising goal._ Our Democrat opponent outraised us last period--we cannot let that happen again. **Will you donate before midnight tonight to help us reach this goal?**
---
| [Chip in Today!](https://troydowning.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7f12ce154379a6c3af4424424&id=6d55de8ba6&e=a212bb87cc "Chip in Today!")
---
| My opponent wants to build the bureaucracy. More bureaucrats means more unneeded burdens on our small businesses at a time when Bullock’s shutdowns have destroyed many Main St. businesses. This November, we need to elect every Republican on the ballot. We need to cut taxes on hard-working families, permanently remove unreasonable regulations, and slash government spending. Only the Republican party has the courage to do what needs to be done to protect the next generation. _**Please donate now! This election is too important to our state to stand on the sidelines. **_ -Troy

body:
We are short of tonight's grassroots fundraising goal. |
---
Friend, there's no easy way to say this.

**With just hours to go on the last day of the month, we're still __$10,000 short__ of our $100,000 grassroots fundraising goal.**

Jon is running against David Perdue, known as Donald Trump's "favorite Senator" and first-term "co-pilot."

_Perdue has voted repeatedly to gut the ACA, and was too busy trading medical stocks and lining his own pockets in January and February to warn the people of Georgia about the impending pandemic._

_And he's got the backing of the Trump family, Karl Rove's super PACs, and Mitch McConnell's dark money donor network._

**The GOP is spending MILLIONS on this race, because they know if Jon wins his race, Democrats will take control of the Senate from McConnell.**

And right now, Jon is surging!

But we need to hit $100,000 in grassroots support by the end of today to continue our path to victory -- _and we've fallen behind_.

**[Fortunately, it's not too late. Rush a $20 donation so we can keep up our momentum and compete with the GOP money machine trying to stop Jon.](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2198/5b2c1286/3e0f340d/25f118c3/621811273/VEsO/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_07_31_eom_bhnd?refcode=em_2020_07_31_eom_bhnd&amount=20")**
| [Chip in $20 immediately >>](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2198/5b2c1286/3e0f340d/25f118c3/621811273/VEsP/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_07_31_eom_bhnd?refcode=em_2020_07_31_eom_bhnd&amount=20")

We're grateful for your support. Thank you!

\- Team Ossoff

If you'd like to donate to our campaign, please [click here.](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2198/5b2c1286/3e0f340d/25f118ca/621811273/VEsHAA/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ms_fr_q32019_ossoff-footer?refcode=MS_FR_HP_X_footer_X__X__X&amount=25&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000,2700&recurring=auto") Thanks for having Jon's back!

subject: before midnight

I know we’ve sent you a lot of emails over the last several days, but we wouldn’t be sending them to you if it wasn’t important. Friend,

I know we’ve sent you a lot of emails over the last several days, but we wouldn’t be sending them to you if it wasn’t important.

**Before I explain what’s at stake in this election, can you rush your first contribution to our campaign to help us reach our critical fundraising goal before our midnight deadline?**

**[Click here to help us reach our $20,000 fundraising goal before midnight, we’re only $1,750 away!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18496228/230131753/1073285021?refcode2=2a907ad9-68d3-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0&emci=a1ff9463-68d3-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0&emdi=2a907ad9-68d3-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0&refcode=073120-es-eom-7-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYTkwN2FkOS02OGQzLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TuK_THSDssYj9fDzwYzu20CFwcRa1qOt5NBR9c4kGsw=)**

From ensuring the interests of actual people are put ahead of the interests of corporations, to restoring accountability to Washington, protecting our environment, and ensuring that everyone has access to the health care they need — the stakes couldn’t be higher in this election.

**The bottom line is that Vern Buchanan embodies all that is wrong with Washington, and as one of the most corrupt members of Congress, it’s past time we made a change.**

We can flip this seat from red to blue, I’ve done it before and I can do it again. But in order to do that we need the resources to fight back against the massive sums of money he’s taking from corporate PACs. While Vern has taken hundreds of thousands of dollars from corporate special interests, I refuse to take corporate PAC money, because I believe in representing the people, not corporations.

**Our government shouldn’t be for sale to the highest bidder, and this is your opportunity to show that a campaign powered by the people is more powerful than their campaign that’s funded by corporations.**

**[Please, click here to contribute any amount you can afford before our midnight fundraising deadline, so we can show Vern and his corporate allies that we have the support we need to flip this seat.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18496230/230131755/1073285021?refcode2=2a907ad9-68d3-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0&emci=a1ff9463-68d3-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0&emdi=2a907ad9-68d3-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0&refcode=073120-es-eom-7-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYTkwN2FkOS02OGQzLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TuK_THSDssYj9fDzwYzu20CFwcRa1qOt5NBR9c4kGsw=)**

I’m so grateful for all that you do to support our campaign.

Thank you.

Margaret Good

[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18496232/230131757/1073285021?refcode2=2a907ad9-68d3-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0&emci=a1ff9463-68d3-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0&emdi=2a907ad9-68d3-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0&refcode=073120-es-eom-7-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYTkwN2FkOS02OGQzLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TuK_THSDssYj9fDzwYzu20CFwcRa1qOt5NBR9c4kGsw=)

PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY MARGARET GOOD FOR CONGRESS

Margaret Good for Congress

Sarasota, FL 34277

Margaret Good is a lawyer, runner, and state representative running in FL-16 to change the face of Southwest Florida, and we are so proud to have you on our team. We need to send her to Congress to continue fighting for us.

name: bloomberg.org
subject: A possible treatment takes a step forward
body:
Johns Hopkins Bloomberg School of Public Health is leading the way

| [](http://i.mikebloomberg.com/u/click?_t=8613ca2a3316453b8f979e9fa5797d01&_m=4fc9eeceda924942940c56ea382183f2&_e=Vg3aiqq8zKlKhePLnBVqs8e5Bcxd5_XpB4TfawY7BfxLUuIa7hMwXgYMjgP2f8ZFCA2PRQWj6-0bfpJp5ze2Gw6trYWwYC1T_-ZUkjOQsqPHRgXnpOY30s80aiwyIhCSaNfafjDQ8rYUYSJOgRE7XwvBDRSlXhhciI4lFrLSDyEHU_qNQxTVNq2WCRbFksiJbA66x7GG3N59nAk9XekBnJvdtJBXF3yW6dJVotzgBqat-Ki50-lJQdqIPU0wHPIyNa-5_9LiRk50_jcjod8MaFt9Dg5MzTRJHzuqThwEf70FaamhKHbvT7lLkTM9ooED) Friend,

Since the outset of the global pandemic, teams at the Johns Hopkins Bloomberg School of Public Health have been moving quickly to develop and test a treatment for COVID-19. Their work has focused on convalescent plasma therapy, which uses a transfusion of blood plasma from COVID-19 survivors to provide antibodies that can treat or prevent infection in others.

The treatment has shown promise -- and its development has moved at an unprecedented pace. "On March 1st, 2020, no convalescent plasma was being used in the United States," says Dr. Arturo Casadevall, the lead researcher on the project at the Johns Hopkins Bloomberg School of Public Health. "By the end of the month, people were being treated."

In late March, Bloomberg Philanthropies provided $3 million to fund broader research and testing along with the State of Maryland. **Now the program is taking another step forward: The Johns Hopkins Bloomberg School of Public Health will soon lead two nationwide clinical trials to further assess the potential of the therapy.**

To learn more about convalescent plasma therapy and how it might be used to fight COVID-19, watch this video from the Johns Hopkins Bloomberg School of Public Health: [](http://i.mikebloomberg.com/u/click?_t=8613ca2a3316453b8f979e9fa5797d01&_m=4fc9eeceda924942940c56ea382183f2&_e=Vg3aiqq8zKlKhePLnBVqs_5HgSVsecQDMMBGO1Pexf00g0A1CeX1wzBo1b9jVFc9sO_b0n2ExTRYGY5GCdW-3zxXcINWbDfRe-KdIjL4C5d8tZ_i7qjIjmj2PyZlzPIY-614W7-7IHAnVk3zBBgmqc76rMKIDHZ_s2x7qpY1vmMCGBQDjGg28dqdpSUS0SxYMWUfLaVTqDv5pm6Nq7KzHGLeaWPBnYXavpz0Ln0Cy9bFz7IFe4S_IBdpDHpqkJ1OSb7-7tjYXsWnaxPH8x9sqoUNhkkfLo9RjVPJ8H2-_vXhvaMMXV4MZNMbbKBMNZsKf4ao6ZjfCkriYVDXWZALojJvW7a5uz3lC1bxfPxlekaS7CjGl_yzDIxYvjWLrr7JZwKPHt_i9lbhQdwVcMlPcw%3D%3D) | [WATCH NOW](http://i.mikebloomberg.com/u/click?_t=8613ca2a3316453b8f979e9fa5797d01&_m=4fc9eeceda924942940c56ea382183f2&_e=Vg3aiqq8zKlKhePLnBVqs_5HgSVsecQDMMBGO1Pexf00g0A1CeX1wzBo1b9jVFc9sO_b0n2ExTRYGY5GCdW-3zxXcINWbDfRe-KdIjL4C5d8tZ_i7qjIjmj2PyZlzPIY-614W7-7IHAnVk3zBBgmqc76rMKIDHZ_s2x7qpY1vmMCGBQDjGg28dqdpSUS0SxY9nVBPPdZXZ_bdcChIVrmf-vIWMptw4LIoSAuSGUuViGfv1RLQ2ULr24bmhseFzDb8ddmcLMPEnK0K3S9anbQ5OzAw0MbKE0A3HZTqRIT8jKkAzCYI8JPWfUcBH-jmTrK4E-gYrcYhVfnZK618kRBl1YvFZ3QEF0UP38A23FHScLIf5eDgaJGgwElFt_-OO3nQDnMSpaJTSe-0e3o12RYeg%3D%3D)
---
In the video, Dr. Casadevall explains how convalescent blood plasma can be used to treat or prevent COVID-19 -- and gives a look inside the work taking place to help provide treatment and immunity with convalescent plasma.

As the research moves into national trials, take a moment to learn about the potential of convalescent blood plasma to help address the COVID-19 pandemic:

[**https://youtu.be/7vlgOVKo7W4**](http://i.mikebloomberg.com/u/click?_t=8613ca2a3316453b8f979e9fa5797d01&_m=4fc9eeceda924942940c56ea382183f2&_e=FTECM_gylrPD6AbabEjPVSYTDSugh4KLEeBX9MCd4d00baviN5cVf6VU_Q-G92cAhF9Q6DAAVZ26B1ufijG_o_5d579bODpNflDfllSBAqYGhg-NSagK6s7GSu2MZhBMnG-Ikwh5Wl6vJ4PzSWlBUO8JDA69XKy-Bs__Bg3DchV5WrVj1VxYxws7-LHZPNJUMt9ziiE4g0UQg7tiP-Imxeo16OHgRIIcNaWJDHY4_ZKuol0gw6_vOG03WjboVY4nr9Jqs4tO9y77Ps5C-awKGHb_4g_L7oG-ZhHXFMx_zk_THLJ7BWyC8RO2c-wQLluhH9nXqau2-OAjtQFS6uH_-k5Pb4IJSvxURsycevxdd-DsRroW0bLRAmFDRTUSn5QCs81_jCQ9FH80x7crK-7GXA%3D%3D)

We're grateful to all of the doctors and researchers at the Johns Hopkins Bloomberg School of Public Health for all they're doing to help us stay healthy -- and stay hopeful.

Thanks,
Bloomberg Philanthropies

| [](http://i.mikebloomberg.com/u/click?_t=8613ca2a3316453b8f979e9fa5797d01&_m=4fc9eeceda924942940c56ea382183f2&_e=Vg3aiqq8zKlKhePLnBVqs9MmkhjhJ_coBgf96Aek97upuJOXexqVjNk33oNO28oOo9COUDmAH2LG70p0UWVZeNv7e33uLUa54axiSylHQbZ_ioPH-NymGpzySIWvJaghd7WV1kpVcyVAwY9SIb3rZkf3a4osm-8ZX5brfWaEjMlZp9_Lfq2wUH0-Ad4V1OjqKTAeUDl9wpaTekRZRsWwjaieDLXymrY0_625RhSUoWg9r46RxOL8DPx12eLYFloDaJg74-Suk_GCIiziEJq-uG2iW9fgKTgpp5OBO_etNvs%3D) | | [](http://i.mikebloomberg.com/u/click?_t=8613ca2a3316453b8f979e9fa5797d01&_m=4fc9eeceda924942940c56ea382183f2&_e=Vg3aiqq8zKlKhePLnBVqs340XX4vhn3RWOpRIvdaibeaH_sBJScDRaV2d6_Kx_mn8f-iuzHMW5mRbTGle8R1s70TPDNPsaKMImedK3dxihDFEWJY1pNK-ruIlf42nWfxK26Q--BU2Rc58p6AMMPpktcsm1hSUjpF6mwI87GO492QIk-b0f50XS3uOAu-yILP_FmIn2B2OiFbL6pOuyfcTMldPQH_Uytl7nVfc8CaGfrYVpAMebJJm_oPtiIwR-GZdMyrPOATCmcL6i-KwBkL7Q%3D%3D) | | [](http://i.mikebloomberg.com/u/click?_t=8613ca2a3316453b8f979e9fa5797d01&_m=4fc9eeceda924942940c56ea382183f2&_e=Vg3aiqq8zKlKhePLnBVqs9wNbyGRd9KUr6xr5draSJYfT90PtE-dkuk2niLhJr4Yxr1_0uKnKMQ7rFVa8hf1bNbcSF3EO6i8OTYUQTa9ZMoqguL2rTdqqgnbtMnC80FzTSaq4_GXrp8GAgojCiSidRlg4TsRwdydjwLWPwszUvHZwEaJZAa31fSFsflKI7S3bNRs1OJgbRNGE9-8laLNixRbnOvD7L1_xk3CHt4HhPV0idn6dCUVRe93rf8hAQdFyfbvBd6ah4r5XyL-BED7qEVI9q8RWx55K51B4B9nVq8%3D)

subject: time’s almost up!

Friend,

I’ll cut right to the chase –

Radical progressives have taken over the Democratic Party, but they’re not going to be satisfied unless they get to take over our whole country in 95 days.

_With the White House, the Senate, and Congress up for grabs right now, we can’t afford to ignore this very real threat._

**If we fail to stop them where it matters most – at the ballot box! – then I have no doubt that we will be looking at an unrecognizable America four years from now.**

I don’t want to wait and find out what that America will look like, Friend.

That’s why my campaign is firing on all cylinders right now.

We can’t wait until November 3rd to start fighting to preserve our rights, our freedoms, and our future. The time to start fighting back is now, and with our fundraising deadline coming up at midnight, we need all the support we can gather tonight.

**_Can I count on you to chip in $5, $10, $25, $50 or whatever you can spare to help us stop the radical Left’s agenda from taking over our country on Election Day?_**
