name: Tea Party Patriots Action
subject: Big-tech Censorship, Doctors speaking out, and Rest in Peace Herman Cain
body:
**[Web version](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/m/1/49109489/02-b20213-823bc1560ba745039abd2d5cd1928faa/79/840/5fd171e1-c476-41f8-8c41-4b6f08045059)** Once again, the Left-owned Big Tech companies tried to silence conservatives and tried to hide the truth about COVID-19 treatment options! Google/Youtube, Twitter, Facebook and Vimeo removed viral videos of the America’s Frontline Doctors Summit, which consisted of doctors from around the country that we helped organize. The summit was meant to help ease the fears of Americans about reopening the economy and schools by highlighting treatment options, dispelling myths and lies. The social media giants took down the viral videos from nearly all of TPP's platform pages “for sharing false information about cures and treatments for COVID-19.” [Breitbart News posted a live video](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMjEzLTgyM2JjMTU2MGJhNzQ1MDM5YWJkMmQ1Y2QxOTI4ZmFh%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYnJlaXRiYXJ0LmNvbS90ZWNoLzIwMjAvMDcvMjcvZmFjZWJvb2stY2Vuc29ycy12aXJhbC12aWRlby1vZi1kb2N0b3JzLWNhcGl0b2wtaGlsbC1jb3JvbmF2aXJ1cy1wcmVzcy1jb25mZXJlbmNlLz9taWQ9NDI0NjAmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=gxz6P6uLXzOFVJGzs-c54A) of the America's Frontline Doctors Summit on Facebook and it received over 17 million views during the eight hours it was on the platform. [Twitter restricted some of Donald Trump Jr.'s account capabilities](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMjEzLTgyM2JjMTU2MGJhNzQ1MDM5YWJkMmQ1Y2QxOTI4ZmFh%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMQ%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZm94bmV3cy5jb20vbWVkaWEvZG9uYWxkLXRydW1wLWpyLXR3aXR0ZXItY2hpbmEtcHJvcGFnYW5kYT9taWQ9NDI0NjAmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=reZSfJaHzV38PTXXuGRGIQ) after he posted the video on his account. The Left and Big Tech have usurped the decisions that doctors should be making regarding COVID-19 and their patients. The Left has removed or suppressed posts, suspended or banned conservatives from popular platforms, and they have increased their efforts during this election year for obvious reasons. The Left is trying to weaponize COVID-19 and the accompanying hysteria in order to hurt President Trump's reelection campaign. It will not work because conservatives refuse to stay silent. [We urge you to watch and share these videos and GET THE TRUTH OUT about COVID-19 treatment options. ](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMjEzLTgyM2JjMTU2MGJhNzQ1MDM5YWJkMmQ1Y2QxOTI4ZmFh%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMg%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGVhcGFydHlwYXRyaW90cy5vcmcvYW1lcmljYXMtZnJvbnRsaW5lLWRvY3RvcnMtc3VtbWl0Lz9taWQ9NDI0NjAmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=IlH3qh_oPC2Da5v4QtHzyQ) [ ](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMjEzLTgyM2JjMTU2MGJhNzQ1MDM5YWJkMmQ1Y2QxOTI4ZmFh%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMw%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGVhcGFydHlwYXRyaW90cy5vcmcvYW1lcmljYXMtZnJvbnRsaW5lLWRvY3RvcnMtc3VtbWl0Lz9taWQ9NDI0NjAmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=wsJabrE0N6T7Knc9ibMsjA) **[America's Frontline Doctors Summit](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMjEzLTgyM2JjMTU2MGJhNzQ1MDM5YWJkMmQ1Y2QxOTI4ZmFh%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3ANA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGVhcGFydHlwYXRyaW90cy5vcmcvYW1lcmljYXMtZnJvbnRsaW5lLWRvY3RvcnMtc3VtbWl0Lz9taWQ9NDI0NjAmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=TFu0llT58XOW4zYLRoqMmg)**
American life has fallen casualty to a massive disinformation campaign. The purpose of the American Frontline Doctor's Summit is to empower Americans to stop living in fear. **[Watch now...](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMjEzLTgyM2JjMTU2MGJhNzQ1MDM5YWJkMmQ1Y2QxOTI4ZmFh%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3ANQ%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGVhcGFydHlwYXRyaW90cy5vcmcvYW1lcmljYXMtZnJvbnRsaW5lLWRvY3RvcnMtc3VtbWl0Lz9taWQ9NDI0NjAmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=qIYk48gCxW38lf8JutBujw)** | |
---
The America’s Frontline Doctors Summit, which TPP helped organize, was a success! Doctors from all around the country travelled to Washington D.C. to discuss plans to reopen the economy, reopen schools, and provide treatment options to Americans.

[In the first video](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMjEzLTgyM2JjMTU2MGJhNzQ1MDM5YWJkMmQ1Y2QxOTI4ZmFh%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3ANg%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYml0Y2h1dGUuY29tL3ZpZGVvL2JZTE9VZDZhVzlvUy8_bWlkPTQyNDYwJmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=xtJy_8jHArLICmJgQJukrQ), doctors dispel myths and lies about keeping our kids out of school.

[ ](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMjEzLTgyM2JjMTU2MGJhNzQ1MDM5YWJkMmQ1Y2QxOTI4ZmFh%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3ANw%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYml0Y2h1dGUuY29tL3ZpZGVvL2JZTE9VZDZhVzlvUy8_bWlkPTQyNDYwJmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=MraHixBUwpFMaPj-tDWzXQ)

[The second video](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMjEzLTgyM2JjMTU2MGJhNzQ1MDM5YWJkMmQ1Y2QxOTI4ZmFh%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AOA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYml0Y2h1dGUuY29tL3ZpZGVvLzdiVDNQNDlkek9pSy8_bWlkPTQyNDYwJmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=k2VskmeH_mfw3kkaPE0yQw) shows the science, the research and the success of hydroxychloroquine used to treat COVID-19 patients.

[ ](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMjEzLTgyM2JjMTU2MGJhNzQ1MDM5YWJkMmQ1Y2QxOTI4ZmFh%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AOQ%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYml0Y2h1dGUuY29tL3ZpZGVvLzdiVDNQNDlkek9pSy8_bWlkPTQyNDYwJmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=_i8E4MUtDXqNp8uGYpNCGw)

Americans have received a lot of misinformation from the mainstream media during this pandemic. It’s time for America to receive the truth and return back to normal!
|
---
On July 30, our beloved friend Herman Cain passed away after a battle with COVID-19. He was an American business executive, a former presidential candidate, and a dedicated Tea Party activist. Jenny Beth Martin released the following statement:

_“Herman Cain will truly be missed, he was one of the greatest conservative voices of all time. I’ll never forget his smiling face. He was a good friend of mine and the tea party movement. He helped me stay strong when others tried to tear me down. My dearest condolences for his family and friends.”_

[ ](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMjEzLTgyM2JjMTU2MGJhNzQ1MDM5YWJkMmQ1Y2QxOTI4ZmFh%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMTA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZm94YnVzaW5lc3MuY29tL2J1c2luZXNzLWxlYWRlcnMvaGVybWFuLWNhaW4tYW4tYW1lcmljYW4tcGF0cmlvdC1hbWVyaWNhbi1pbnNwaXJhdGlvbj9taWQ9NDI0NjAmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=L1Em3uPtIQOmKhGNfM7YfQ)

**[Herman Cain, An American patriot& inspiration](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMjEzLTgyM2JjMTU2MGJhNzQ1MDM5YWJkMmQ1Y2QxOTI4ZmFh%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMTE%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZm94YnVzaW5lc3MuY29tL2J1c2luZXNzLWxlYWRlcnMvaGVybWFuLWNhaW4tYW4tYW1lcmljYW4tcGF0cmlvdC1hbWVyaWNhbi1pbnNwaXJhdGlvbj9taWQ9NDI0NjAmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=BVNgbPGHC0ZtRG2z4bCcFA)**
Herman Cain died on July 30 from complications brought on by COVID-19 and the news quickly unleashed an outpouring of tributes, appreciation and gratitude. His life was a constant rocket ship powered by optimism, confidence and determination. His orbit was the American Dream. **[Read more...](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMjEzLTgyM2JjMTU2MGJhNzQ1MDM5YWJkMmQ1Y2QxOTI4ZmFh%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMTI%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZm94YnVzaW5lc3MuY29tL2J1c2luZXNzLWxlYWRlcnMvaGVybWFuLWNhaW4tYW4tYW1lcmljYW4tcGF0cmlvdC1hbWVyaWNhbi1pbnNwaXJhdGlvbj9taWQ9NDI0NjAmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=7VgZCisfV29NFdv38TbnNg)**
|
---
Hydroxychloroquine (HCQ) is a life-saving drug that can be used to help COVID-19 patients and we need your help to make sure those patients get the proper help they need.

Federal regulations allow health care professionals to lawfully prescribe or use FDA-approved drugs for both “on-label” and “off-label” uses. On July 9, 2020, Dr. Deborah Birx stated to Drs. Simone Gold, Teryn Clark, and Richard Urso, and Jenny Beth Martin that the FDA’s release of the Emergency Use Authorization (EUA) on HCQ allowed for physicians to prescribe HCQ in off-label uses for their patients, as they are permitted to do for all FDA-approved drugs.

However, the government has created a barrier between the doctor-patient relationship as it pertains to HCQ and inadvertently taken the power to save lives out of the hands of doctors all around the country.

We demand that the American people have access to a safe, generic, widely-available drug that is routinely given to pregnant women, breastfeeding women, children, the elderly and the immune-compromised since it was FDA-approved 65 years and billions of dosages ago.

[**Sign our letter urging President Donald Trump, Vice President Mike Pence and Dr. Stephen M. Hahn to break down these barriers and give doctors access to prescribe this drug to their patients as they see fit.**](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMjEzLTgyM2JjMTU2MGJhNzQ1MDM5YWJkMmQ1Y2QxOTI4ZmFh%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMTM%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9kb2NzLmdvb2dsZS5jb20vZm9ybXMvZC9lLzFGQUlwUUxTYzh5dlBzb0ZpV19TQUVsYnA1TnAwVE9qUUJYYVpIS0Z6dHRvVjdsLXp3cDExLXVnL3ZpZXdmb3JtP21pZD00MjQ2MCZpZD1UMThvOUxuZXVqSGhrOTFRUVE&K=ITvYyq5OdeDOCNfMemsyTg)

clean_body: Once again, the Left-owned Big Tech companies tried to silence conservatives and tried to hide the truth about COVID-19 treatment options! Google/Youtube, Twitter, Facebook and Vimeo removed viral videos of the America’s Frontline Doctors Summit, which consisted of doctors from around the country that we helped organize. The summit was meant to help ease the fears of Americans about reopening the economy and schools by highlighting treatment options, dispelling myths and lies. The social media giants took down the viral videos from nearly all of TPP's platform pages “for sharing false information about cures and treatments for COVID-19.” of the America's Frontline Doctors Summit on Facebook and it received over 17 million views during the eight hours it was on the platform. after he posted the video on his account. The Left and Big Tech have usurped the decisions that doctors should be making regarding COVID-19 and their patients. The Left has removed or suppressed posts, suspended or banned conservatives from popular platforms, and they have increased their efforts during this election year for obvious reasons. The Left is trying to weaponize COVID-19 and the accompanying hysteria in order to hurt President Trump's reelection campaign. It will not work because conservatives refuse to stay silent. American life has fallen casualty to a massive disinformation campaign. The purpose of the American Frontline Doctor's Summit is to empower Americans to stop living in fear. | | The America’s Frontline Doctors Summit, which TPP helped organize, was a success! Doctors from all around the country travelled to Washington D.C. to discuss plans to reopen the economy, reopen schools, and provide treatment options to Americans. , doctors dispel myths and lies about keeping our kids out of school. shows the science, the research and the success of hydroxychloroquine used to treat COVID-19 patients. Americans have received a lot of misinformation from the mainstream media during this pandemic. It’s time for America to receive the truth and return back to normal! | On July 30, our beloved friend Herman Cain passed away after a battle with COVID-19. He was an American business executive, a former presidential candidate, and a dedicated Tea Party activist. Jenny Beth Martin released the following statement: “Herman Cain will truly be missed, he was one of the greatest conservative voices of all time. I’ll never forget his smiling face. He was a good friend of mine and the tea party movement. He helped me stay strong when others tried to tear me down. My dearest condolences for his family and friends.” Herman Cain died on July 30 from complications brought on by COVID-19 and the news quickly unleashed an outpouring of tributes, appreciation and gratitude. His life was a constant rocket ship powered by optimism, confidence and determination. His orbit was the American Dream. | Hydroxychloroquine (HCQ) is a life-saving drug that can be used to help COVID-19 patients and we need your help to make sure those patients get the proper help they need. Federal regulations allow health care professionals to lawfully prescribe or use FDA-approved drugs for both “on-label” and “off-label” uses. On July 9, 2020, Dr. Deborah Birx stated to Drs. Simone Gold, Teryn Clark, and Richard Urso, and Jenny Beth Martin that the FDA’s release of the Emergency Use Authorization (EUA) on HCQ allowed for physicians to prescribe HCQ in off-label uses for their patients, as they are permitted to do for all FDA-approved drugs. However, the government has created a barrier between the doctor-patient relationship as it pertains to HCQ and inadvertently taken the power to save lives out of the hands of doctors all around the country. We demand that the American people have access to a safe, generic, widely-available drug that is routinely given to pregnant women, breastfeeding women, children, the elderly and the immune-compromised since it was FDA-approved 65 years and billions of dosages ago. | |

subject: Cindy Hyde-Smith is not the leader Mississippi needs or deserves
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mike Espy for U
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18497340/230152725/1543981737?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZTE5NDYwZi03MGQzLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QMh5JGLR1NC6sZxudfhDEAcPfkfX3Tvk7HCfk1h820Y=&emci=4d19460f-70d3-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0&emdi=4e19460f-70d3-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0&ceid=11809611)
Hey folks, I wanted to reach out one more time before the month ends and we close the books on July. **Tonight at midnight is our next critical fundraising deadline, so I hope you’ll let me explain why your support matters more than ever before.** We’re now 95 days out from the general election, and through a widespread coalition of grassroots support, we have spent the last few months building a positive, forward-thinking, and powerful campaign to bring more progress to Mississippi. We know what our state needs: Long-overdue Medicaid expansion and accessible, affordable health care, aid to our struggling rural hospitals, more financial relief for people put out of work by the COVID-19 pandemic, good-paying jobs and economic opportunities to keep our young people in the state, and a great public education for every child. We need a leader in Washington D.C. who’s willing to be an independent voice for change, not simply vote in line with their party’s hyper-partisan agenda. And we need a leader who represents all Mississippians – not one who ignores injustice and glorifies symbols of our hateful past. Cindy Hyde-Smith does not represent us. She hides from her constituents and ignores our calls for change. After stalling for months on coronavirus relief, Cindy Hyde-Smith is pushing a bill that hurts working families. And she continues to sit on the fence when it comes to removing Mississippi’s confederate statues from the U.S. Capitol. My opponent believes the best days of Mississippi were in its difficult past. I say they’re ahead of us. I’m ready to get to work and bring more progress to our state, but I can’t do it without you. We have three months left until voters make their voices heard in one of the most important elections in our lifetime. We have to make the most of them. clean_body: | Hey folks, I wanted to reach out one more time before the month ends and we close the books on July. Tonight at midnight is our next critical fundraising deadline, so I hope you’ll let me explain why your support matters more than ever before. We’re now 95 days out from the general election, and through a widespread coalition of grassroots support, we have spent the last few months building a positive, forward-thinking, and powerful campaign to bring more progress to Mississippi. We know what our state needs: Long-overdue Medicaid expansion and accessible, affordable health care, aid to our struggling rural hospitals, more financial relief for people put out of work by the COVID-19 pandemic, good-paying jobs and economic opportunities to keep our young people in the state, and a great public education for every child. We need a leader in Washington D.C. who’s willing to be an independent voice for change, not simply vote in line with their party’s hyper-partisan agenda. And we need a leader who represents all Mississippians – not one who ignores injustice and glorifies symbols of our hateful past. Cindy Hyde-Smith does not represent us. She hides from her constituents and ignores our calls for change. After stalling for months on coronavirus relief, Cindy Hyde-Smith is pushing a bill that hurts working families. And she continues to sit on the fence when it comes to removing Mississippi’s confederate statues from the U.S. Capitol. My opponent believes the best days of Mississippi were in its difficult past. I say they’re ahead of us. I’m ready to get to work and bring more progress to our state, but I can’t do it without you. We have three months left until voters make their voices heard in one of the most important elections in our lifetime. We have to make the most of them. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = I’m so grateful for folks like you. – Mike Paid for by Mike Espy for U.S. Senate Mike Espy for U.S. Senate 4450 Old Canton Rd, Suite 205 Jackson, MS 39211 United States

Friend,
Today is the last day of the month, and that means it’s our **_biggest fundraising deadline_** since winning the Democratic Primary on June 23rd. We won because of supporters like you who know that Mondaire will be a champion for working people and will best represent NY-17.
But we still need your help. **_[In fact, we are $6,189 away from our July fundraising goal. Can you chip in before midnight to help us raise what we need?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zNJoY5PV721shYv7dMEUZINeznTnxDN1UC1WmBuvMDtSq_Y6QAnjimepWO5sYEr9CwLq6J8R4ooUJTuQpmRYpdMbE5EWKdRAFlVEuPTjJLFlCL3HlzPesAOhSL1JD12fx2C0DIAiOcqeYGrwTxr71I5R5xZD7Eyjv8GxUKyxHhaY_pUVNIgq-4h4Vgpez-SRB19c7RzG0p99p9kOOXB4K5det5qHek7GwguMWVtwq4WgbQViBIUnIOklxdvfoYdcjzLNKqDs_n3BCgyqwr0wrT603PTn-tL_FFO8j7iqbuS218jAplUZsBHYBqnsphrYQ/33x/i3sEKipmRzuyxAQrQOnLlg/h1/DWiRclkL7QoAf3a_35i6Cxw3bCZlBTmRJRgXaVTHq6I)_**
We’re back asking for your help because this election is far from over and we can’t take this victory for granted. We need to keep raising money so that we can phonebank, send out mail, and air TV ads to inform every voter in NY-17 that Mondaire will fight tooth and nail to help them get back on their feet.
Yesterday, Mondaire joined nurses at New York-Presbyterian Hudson Valley in demanding that hospital executives enter into a fair contract with their frontline workers. That means a long overdue wage increase and safe working conditions. It’s the least one of the richest hospital networks in the country can do for nurses who risk their lives every day to keep the rest of us healthy in the midst of COVID-19.

| | Team,

Will needs your help today. Earlier this month, we found out Will was the top fundraiser of all Republican challengers in the state. And since then, he's stayed very active campaigning - we released an endorsement from Senator John Cornyn, got back to block-walking, and Will was profiled by the Dallas Morning News.

But in the process, Will has become the #1 target of liberals across the state. So, it’s more important than ever that we continue to meet our critical fundraising goals so we can keep up the fight.

We're just $2,492 away from our July fundraising goal - can you [donate](https://willdouglasfortexas.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f04ec3916ea34d520e31df9fc&id=1688ddcfb3&e=4f010155df) today and help take us over the top? Our deadline is tonight at midnight so anything you can [donate](https://willdouglasfortexas.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f04ec3916ea34d520e31df9fc&id=60b0506f43&e=4f010155df) between now and then would go directly toward our goal!

Send a message to the liberal establishment and far-left Democrats. Don’t let them turn Texas blue! [Please make an immediate donation to Will's campaign and help us fight back >>](https://willdouglasfortexas.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f04ec3916ea34d520e31df9fc&id=5c015d2047&e=4f010155df)

Thank you,
Team Will Douglas

name: =?utf-8?Q?Dave=20Lindstrom?=
subject: Growing Kansas Ethanol
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/lindstromforsenate.com/growing-kansas-ethanol?e=41f8e27552)
---
| |
---
| |
# As I travel around Kansas I have been seeing large amounts of corn stored across our state and more corn to come after this fall’s harvest. Not all corn ends up on American dinner tables, with corn being used in other ways, in particular the production of ethanol.

Ethanol production accounts for 33-percent of all corn use in this country, with ethanol being added to gasoline, serving as an additive to increase fuel efficiency. While ethanol has helped American consumers and farmers, there are those who want to hurt the ethanol industry, filing court cases and lobbying Congress and federal agencies in a bid to reduce ethanol usage in gasoline.

Seeing the impact of this, this week I wrote to President Trump to point out the impact of ethanol on farmers and our rural economy. I also pointed to the applications for ethanol production facilities sitting on the EPA administrator’s desk.

As a senator, I will fight for our farmers and I will for rural Kansas. Rural Kansas needs an advocate who will focus on economic growth and I will be that senator.

**[Click here to read my letter to President Trump.](https://lindstromforsenate.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ee3d772208da8fb4e06e0f598&id=954d54935d&e=41f8e27552)**

Feel free to share this message with your friends and family and remind them to vote. You can find [your polling place here](https://lindstromforsenate.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ee3d772208da8fb4e06e0f598&id=47986dcbbf&e=41f8e27552).

Dave

name: Jay Inslee
subject: Early to bed. Early to rise. Work like hell and organize.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JAY INSLEE FOR WASHINGTON (D)
body:
No matter what, we'll be ready -- if you step up now.
| [](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/8912?t=3&akid=8111%2E868730%2E1uIrvT) _We are going through great challenges and upheaval in both our country and our state. If you would prefer not to see campaign emails in your inbox right now,**[please click here to take a pause for a few weeks.](https://act.jayinslee.com/signup/snooze/?t=4&akid=8111%2E868730%2E1uIrvT)** Thanks, and take care._ Friend, You know my favorite saying: _Early to bed, early to rise, work like hell and organize._ That's exactly what we're doing right now: working together to make this campaign as strong as possible before we have an official Republican opponent in just a few days. No matter which of the leading candidates it is, we know they'll continue to sow divisiveness and fear, when what we really need is unity and steady, moral leadership. **[Invest in the leadership we're showing here in Washington by donating $5 or more before tonight's midnight end-of-month deadline -- it really does make a huge difference to our campaign right now.](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/10202?t=5&akid=8111%2E868730%2E1uIrvT)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$5 →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/10203?t=6&akid=8111%2E868730%2E1uIrvT)

We set an aggressive and ambitious $75,000 fundraising goal because it's clear that the GOP is laser-focused on trying to take me out this November -- and whether it's childish name calling on Twitter or spreading misinformation through campaign ads, this is just the beginning.
National GOP leaders are just setting the stage for my opponent, who will pick up the Trump banner and wave it high as soon as he's won the primary next week. No matter who it will be -- and trust me, any of the options are pretty scary -- they will hit hard, right out of the gate.
**We have to be prepared. We're $15,678 short of our $75,000 goal, and we have to hit it by midnight tonight.[Will you invest in this campaign with a donation of $5 or more right now?](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/10202?t=12&akid=8111%2E868730%2E1uIrvT)**
Very truly yours,
Jay

name: Kamala Harris
subject: Donald Trump isn't for the people.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
When I launched my campaign for president, I made my motto, "for the people." |
---
| [](https://go.joebiden.%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_q32020?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.07.31_B2_Kamala_X__F1_S2_C1__full&amount=35&amounts=10,35,50,100&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.07.31_B2_Kamala_X__F1_S2_C1__full")
---
Hi Peter, I hope this email finds you well. **[I'm reaching out to ask for $5 to elect Joe Biden, but let me first explain why.](https://go.joebiden.%3D%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_q32020?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.07.31_B2_Kamala_X__F1_S2_C1__full&amount=5&amounts=10,35,50,100&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.06.25_B1_warren_X__F1_S1_C1__ac_T1")**

When I launched my campaign for president, I made my motto, "for the people."

I did so because I believe that the values that we cherish as the American people are on the line in this election, and the future of the kind of country we want to be depends on the work that we do right now.

We all know that Donald Trump is not "for the people." He's for himself. While more than 150,000 Americans have died from COVID-19, Trump has been taking to the golf course and refusing to accept any responsibility. We simply cannot afford four more years of his negligence and narcissism.

And here's one more thing I do know for certain, Peter. Like me, Joe Biden is for the people. I know Joe's heart, and I've seen first-hand his compassion and dedication to public service. He'll be a president for all of us, and I'm giving everything I've got to help him succeed this year.

Now, Joe's campaign is building support, building momentum, and he's got hard-working staff and volunteers across the country putting in long hours every day to make a victory possible. But, he still needs to ensure that his fundraising stays on track in order to match up to the war chest that Trump has been building for over three-and-a-half years, and that's why I'm reaching out.

**[Joe faces a big end-of-month fundraising deadline tonight, and it's imperative that he meets his $8 million July goal. But that result lies squarely in our hands, and while I know you're already doing a lot for his campaign, I hope you find it in your heart to go the extra mile and pitch in your first $5 to his campaign right now »](https://go.joebiden.%3D%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_q32020?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.07.31_B2_Kamala_X__F1_S2_C1__full&amount=5&amounts=10,35,50,100&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.06.25_B1_warren_X__F1_S1_C1__ac_T1")**

clean_body: When I launched my campaign for president, I made my motto, "for the people." | | "" Hi Peter, I hope this email finds you well. "" When I launched my campaign for president, I made my motto, "for the people." I did so because I believe that the values that we cherish as the American people are on the line in this election, and the future of the kind of country we want to be depends on the work that we do right now. We all know that Donald Trump is not "for the people." He's for himself. While more than 150,000 Americans have died from COVID-19, Trump has been taking to the golf course and refusing to accept any responsibility. We simply cannot afford four more years of his negligence and narcissism. And here's one more thing I do know for certain, Peter. Like me, Joe Biden is for the people. I know Joe's heart, and I've seen first-hand his compassion and dedication to public service. He'll be a president for all of us, and I'm giving everything I've got to help him succeed this year. Now, Joe's campaign is building support, building momentum, and he's got hard-working staff and volunteers across the country putting in long hours every day to make a victory possible. But, he still needs to ensure that his fundraising stays on track in order to match up to the war chest that Trump has been building for over three-and-a-half years, and that's why I'm reaching out. "" If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" Peter, thank you for being a part of this fight. A better day for America is coming with Joe as our next president. Kamala Harris U.S. Senator, California | | "" "" "" "" Has the pandemic affected you personally, or do you just want to take a break from emails for a couple weeks? We understand. "" Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email, with a check, or with a spouse -- thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign.

body:
Friend, I know it’s a Friday night, so I’ll make this quick. I just got an update from our Finance Director, Nolan, and as of now we’re still $1,209 short of our July fundraising goal.
_We know that COVID-19 has impacted so many in our community, and we have adapted our campaign to this changing environment. During this difficult time, please only consider contributing to our campaign if you’re able to._ Friend,

I know it’s a Friday night, so I’ll make this quick. I just got an update from our Finance Director, Nolan, and as of now we’re still $1,209 short of our July fundraising goal.

Our deadline is just a few hours away, so I had to reach out one more time. If you can, would you please consider chipping in to help us close the gap?[**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/depasqualeq32020?refcode=July**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18499126/230181516/462758527?refcode=em_fr_2020.07.31_b2_ei_all-nd&refcode2=53e565e7-7ad3-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1M2U1NjVlNy03YWQzLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WlsBKcJ5AsgEPbufAjw6ffWjNDZzu8a9f-Vb4hQ1H-U=)
Friend, it’s crunch time. With less than 100 days until the election, falling short of any of our important fundraising goals could seriously impact our ability to reach voters and flip this seat. I know we can win this race, but only if we work together to get the job done.

Thanks,

Eugene

body:
| | | |
---
| | |
---
| Peter,
I went to Midland and Odessa this week to show my support for the Texas energy industry and meet President Trump. **For most Americans, getting to meet with the president is an honor.** However **to partisan progressive, Colin Allred, it's an opportunity to attack me and raise money from his far-left donor base**. To be honest, I'm sure that the fundraising pitch he sent out was quite successful.

**Colin Allred and his donors hate the president **and** they want to see our Texas energy industry destroyed, which will cause unthinkable harm to our economy. We've got to stop them. [Will you contribute $50, $250, or more to my campaign today?](https://gcforcongress.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=eb0e2b7e83008912623ba9a3e&id=038d188502&e=68aaeb0998)**

_Photo courtesy of Colin Allred_
|
---
| The choice in this election is clear. **We can either reelect someone who stays silent on major issues facing our country, votes with AOC 93% of the time, and who's endorsed by Elizabeth Warren**, or we can vote for a change.

I'm asking you to support my campaign today. The Democrat fundraising machine is working overtime to support my opponent, and [I need your help to out-raise them!](https://gcforcongress.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=eb0e2b7e83008912623ba9a3e&id=74904f9f57&e=68aaeb0998)

We've got to win this election November to stop Nancy Pelosi, AOC, and Elizabeth Warren from controlling this seat's vote. [Please join your fellow conservatives in supporting my campaign today.](https://gcforcongress.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=eb0e2b7e83008912623ba9a3e&id=799a2252b9&e=68aaeb0998)

Thank you and God bless!
---
|
---
| Genevieve Collins

Republican Nominee
Texas Congressional District 32

name: Taylor, MJ Hegar Finance HQ
subject: We can't slow down
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
Our momentum has soared, but we have to keep going.

|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891ebc/7f51f7bc/4017b785/4ef7a3c3/667123653/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | Peter,

Our momentum has soared since MJ won the runoff a few weeks ago! Between the polls and headlines declaring that Texas is flippable, record-breaking Democratic turnout in the runoff, and a Texas-tough, straight-talking combat veteran as the nominee, **it 's become undeniable that Texas is in play.**

But y'all, with fewer than 100 days till the election, we just don't have the time to slow down. We set a huge July goal so MJ can be ready to fight back against Sen. Cornyn's attacks, but we could fall short without 12 new* donors from your area by midnight. **[If you're able, will you step up with a MATCHED donation?](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891ebc/7f51f7bc/4017b785/4ef7a3c2/667123653/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MjEifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-julyeom?refcode=email_20200731.2nd__1821__&amount=10")** | [](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891ebc/7f51f7bc/4017b785/4ef7a3c2/667123653/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MjEifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-julyeom?refcode=email_20200731.2nd__1821__&amount=10")
---
This race is winnable, but we have GOT to keep our grassroots energy high. Sen. Cornyn doesn't have to worry about that because he's got corporate PACs bankrolling his campaign, but we do. I know MJ can count on you to come through. **[Make a MATCHED donation and help us keep up the momentum through November!](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891ebc/7f51f7bc/4017b785/4ef7a3c2/667123653/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MjEifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-julyeom?refcode=email_20200731.2nd__1821__&amount=10")**
Taylor Klos
Texas Finance Director
MJ for Texas

*If you've already contributed to the campaign, thank you so much! Our records are based on donations associated with this email address in our online database, which may take some time to update.

[DONATE](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891ebc/7f51f7bc/4017b785/4ef7a3c2/667123653/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MjEifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-julyeom?refcode=email_20200731.2nd__1821__&amount=10")
---

|
---

| It's clear we need a real leader for Texas and a Senate that prioritizes our health care. **[More than ever, we're relying on online fundraising to keep building the campaign we need to win in November, and we greatly appreciate your continued support>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891ebc/7f51f7bc/4017b785/4ef7a3c0/667123653/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MjEifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-covidfooter?refcode=1821&amount=10")**

However, we know this is not an easy time for many. If you'd like to pause receiving fundraising emails for the next few weeks, **[please let us know here](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891ebc/7f51f7bc/4017b785/4ef7a3c6/667123653/VEsB/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/s/mj-covid-fewer-emails")**. We'll still keep in touch with important information and to ask your thoughts from time to time.

| Friends,

Our July fundraising deadline is tonight at midnight and we are only $2,457 away from our goal!

This race is being rated by national forecasters as one of the most competitive races in the country, and it could really come down to the wire.

We're working hard visiting every county in Southeast Iowa. Recently, over 100 ag leaders have endorsed my campaign. Will you help us gain an edge over our opponent by chipping in $20 $100 or even $50?

With your help we will win in November! [Click here today to help us reach our goal!](https://millermeeks2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7d3bd416b094d33aae4029ad1&id=9455fd71cf&e=16fac31a0f)

Mariannette Miller-Meeks

name: Jenny, Team Warner Finance Director
subject: counting down
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
|
---

| | | [](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85db97/53d9897e/541b532a/1c88238c/2158203195/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjY4NiJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-julymatch?refcode=20200731_f_1_nd__686__&refcode2=graphic&amount=5")
---
[**Donate before midnight to DOUBLE your impact**](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85db97/53d9897e/541b532a/1c88238b/2158203195/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjY4NiJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-julymatch?refcode=20200731_f_1_nd__686__&refcode2=ask1&amount=5")
Derek --

We're just a few hours away from the end of July, so I'll get straight to the point. We're coming to the end of the month, and it's critical that we hit our fundraising goal to send Mark Warner back to the Senate. I'm coming to you with some good news: **Generous donors agreed to match every dollar we raise, up to $10,000! That means your donation will be _doubled._

[If you have the means, will you chip in to help us reach our goal before midnight?](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85db97/53d9897e/541b532a/1c88238a/2158203195/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjY4NiJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-julymatch?refcode=20200731_f_1_nd__686__&refcode2=ask2&amount=5")**

We can't afford to fall short on our fundraising goals. We all know that the election is going to look different this year, and we need to make sure our team has the resources to adapt to virtual events and educate voters about their options to cast their ballot.

Plus, the last time Mark Warner was on the ballot, he won by less than 1%. Our team knows that we can't afford to take anything for granted. With the Trump campaign and GOP donors pouring money into Virginia, we need to make sure we have the resources to reach every voter and keep Virginia blue in November.

We could not do this without you. Our team is what keeps us moving forward to support Mark Warner and Democrats up and down the ballot. Right now, I'm asking for your help to meet our July goal -- **and your impact will be doubled.**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
[DONATE $5 (Now $10!)](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85db97/53d9897e/541b532a/1c882389/2158203195/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjY4NiJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-julymatch?express_lane=true&refcode=20200731_f_1_nd__686__&refcode2=express_lane_1&amount=5")
[DONATE $10 (Now $20!)](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85db97/53d9897e/541b532a/1c882388/2158203195/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjY4NiJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-julymatch?express_lane=true&refcode=20200731_f_1_nd__686__&refcode2=express_lane_2&amount=10")
[DONATE $25 (Now $50!)](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85db97/53d9897e/541b532a/1c8823f7/2158203195/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjY4NiJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-julymatch?express_lane=true&refcode=20200731_f_1_nd__686__&refcode2=express_lane_3&amount=25")
[DONATE $50 (Now $100!)](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85db97/53d9897e/541b532a/1c8823f6/2158203195/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjY4NiJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-julymatch?express_lane=true&refcode=20200731_f_1_nd__686__&refcode2=express_lane_4&amount=50")
[DONATE $100 (Now $200!)](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85db97/53d9897e/541b532a/1c8823f5/2158203195/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjY4NiJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-julymatch?express_lane=true&refcode=20200731_f_1_nd__686__&refcode2=express_lane_5&amount=100")
[CHOOSE AN AMOUNT](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85db97/53d9897e/541b532a/1c8823f4/2158203195/VEsP/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjY4NiJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-julymatch?refcode=20200731_f_1_nd__686__&refcode2=express_lane_other")
Thank you for your support.

-- Jenny, Team Warner Finance Director

body:
And it's thanks to you.
---
| | | | | | |
---
[ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001rPUp57K-AvYYCYB4dhb2trlPIXXJ_hubv2A_Q3tHuAlOLQ69mhS_xOxMoHi8Vj3_kqMAsIXkF1IwIMhyKrwW2O92i6QhchgelgNN23ScTr5ziveforO8AAzoIHJMn50KTHKAfBSBWNyUOVc2pS9A1Qxvwf3PtKfB93l717T3hDA=&c=ih2V2FfoZKp9tmoUV9-eio3rhmv2W_-bYHeTj6p4HmHynEzoQBjWcQ==&ch=AhTbWvvOpDFElzfppTt9rna-kZf8fS406JltCeNTGepFXbb-0ZrW8Q==)

|
---
| Peter,
I wanted to take just one minute of your time to thank you for everything you have already done.
We've come so far since I decided to step up for Southwest Florida, and I couldn't have done it without you.
Exit polls have us leading the pack, but it's clear that this race is going to be extremely tight.
Peter, we're so close to meeting our monthly fundraising goal.
Can you dig just a little deeper?
---
| | | [Contribute Today](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001rPUp57K-AvYYCYB4dhb2trlPIXXJ_hubv2A_Q3tHuAlOLQ69mhS_xFWh6-ugVAcv5sIeiQIixeMGZqVViSI1UTTwyacsKxjxKro59ey_rhQ6_y43syHJOla1AhMI3IWqTH6fOzDgzJKd8PwUuOkqjhTGLNt38HtRxhNsePahdW0=&c=ih2V2FfoZKp9tmoUV9-eio3rhmv2W_-bYHeTj6p4HmHynEzoQBjWcQ==&ch=AhTbWvvOpDFElzfppTt9rna-kZf8fS406JltCeNTGepFXbb-0ZrW8Q==)
---
| When I got into this race, I never expected it to get so dirty.
But I care a lot more about our country than I do about baseless attacks from my opponents, the media, and shady Washington Super PACs.
Your continued support is the reason I'm ahead, and I truly hope I've earned your vote.
With less than three weeks until Election Day, every second, every vote, and every dollar counts.

name: Bill Olson
subject: Help me stop socialist thugs
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WILLIAM OLSON FOR CONGRESS
body:
Bill Olson for Congress

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=hjsm8XwSOF6OuRU&b=2xxBCmNTC_3TjceUBud37w

Hi Peter,

My name is Bill Olson, and I am a conservative Christian combat vet running to take back Florida’s competitive 9th District, currently held by Socialist Democrat Darren Soto. And I need your help to restore sanity to Congress!

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=hjsm8XwSOF6OuRU&b=2xxBCmNTC_3TjceUBud37w

I just wish someone would restore sanity to America! These vicious rioters in Portland, Chicago, Seattle and other liberal cities are not just causing havoc.

They are trying to take away your very freedoms, our American freedoms, and up until now.... they are succeeding.

Remember how the Fascistic the "Anti-Fascist", or Antifa, terrorist movement became? They refuse to allow free speech or debate, and are intimidating Americans from speaking their mind:

Self-censorship is on the rise according to a new Cato Institute survey that reports nearly two-thirds of Americans are afraid to share their political views.

A new CATO Institute/YouGov national survey found 62% of Americans say the political climate today prevents them from saying what they believe. This is up several points from 2017 when 58% of Americans said they were afraid to share their political beliefs.

“31% of liberals, 30% of moderates and 34% of conservatives are worried their political views could get them fired or harm their career trajectory,” the CATO survey stated.

The time has come to stop the Left's "Cancel Culture", and restore the First Amendment so Americans can be Americans again!

A recent poll conducted by Politico found that a plurality of Americans believe cancel culture has gone too far. (RELATED: Poll: Large Plurality of Americans Say Cancel Culture Has Gone Too Far)

“There have been shifts across the board, where more people among all political groups feel they are walking on eggshells,” the CATO survey found, adding, “majorities of Democrats (52%), independents (59%) and Republicans (77%) who all agree they have political opinions they are afraid to share.”

“Strong liberals stand out, however, as the only political group who feel they can express themselves. Nearly 6 in 10 (58%) of staunch liberals feel they can say what they believe,” the CATO survey found.

This problem isn't limited to Portland or Seattle. They won't just attack combatants- they have attacked the elderly and innocent and anyone they just didn't like the look of!

Unless we stop these nutty Stalinist bigots now, this will be the future of every American city.

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=hjsm8XwSOF6OuRU&b=2xxBCmNTC_3TjceUBud37w

Stalinist thugs terrorizing normal Americans. Where does it end?

This Maoist dystopia is Seattle, today; and it will be America, tomorrow- unless we do something RIGHT NOW!

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=hjsm8XwSOF6OuRU&b=2xxBCmNTC_3TjceUBud37w

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=hjsm8XwSOF6OuRU&b=2xxBCmNTC_3TjceUBud37w

Thank God President Trump is sending Federal Law Enforcement into these crazy liberal cities to put down these Antifa terrorists. There must be law and order!

This garbage isn't legal, it isn't Constitutional, and is hard-line Communism- this isn't the America ANY of us know! We must fight now or our country and our freedoms will be lost. Will you stand with me

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=hjsm8XwSOF6OuRU&b=2xxBCmNTC_3TjceUBud37w
?

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=hjsm8XwSOF6OuRU&b=2xxBCmNTC_3TjceUBud37w

I'm a soldier- not a slick politician. But I remember that I have taken an oath to the Constitution! I don't have big PAC money, which is why I need your help!

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=hjsm8XwSOF6OuRU&b=2xxBCmNTC_3TjceUBud37w

I need your help today- to replace Socialist Darren Soto, and stand up for our freedoms against the radical Socialists!

I need your help to stand up FOR the Constitution and AGAINST Communism!

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=hjsm8XwSOF6OuRU&b=2xxBCmNTC_3TjceUBud37w

Can you help me?

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=hjsm8XwSOF6OuRU&b=2xxBCmNTC_3TjceUBud37w
Florida is crucial for the Republicans. It's now the President's home state, with many swing districts like mine that we can flip!

Can I count on you for a donation

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=hjsm8XwSOF6OuRU&b=2xxBCmNTC_3TjceUBud37w
of $15, $35, $60, $250, $500, $1000.... all the way to the Federal maximum donation of $2800 per individual, $5600 per couple?

I appreciate whatever you can send so we can defeat Socialist Darren Soto and stop America from becoming Seattle!

I'm going to make sure the radical Democrats lose BIG this year - with your help!

Let's get this done!

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=hjsm8XwSOF6OuRU&b=2xxBCmNTC_3TjceUBud37w

Bill Olson

Combat Veteran of Multiple Wars

Supports President Trump

Not a Career Politician

Hard Core Conservative Fighter

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=hjsm8XwSOF6OuRU&b=2xxBCmNTC_3TjceUBud37w

P.S. I really need your help today

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=hjsm8XwSOF6OuRU&b=2xxBCmNTC_3TjceUBud37w
, so a conservative combat vet can retake this swing district that the Republicans held just earlier this decade. I can do this - WITH YOUR HELP!

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=hjsm8XwSOF6OuRU&b=2xxBCmNTC_3TjceUBud37w
Thank you and God bless America! - Bill.

body:
|

Friend,

Our fundraising deadline for the month of July is approaching at 11:59 pm tonight and my team has informed me that we are just $2,000 short of our monthly goal! I'm fighting every single day in Congress to make sure our region reaches its full potential and that our conservative values are protected - and that's why it so important that we reach our goal. My opponent, Nate McMurray, is running on the same platform as Nancy Pelosi, AOC, and the Socialist Squad - one that makes our country less safe, and our taxes much higher.
I think that's ridiculous. That's why my focus is on supporting our small businesses, supporting our law enforcement, building our economy, and building up our infrastructure.
[Can you chip in $5, $10, or $20 right now and help us reach our goal and stop the radical democrats in their tracks? Every single dollar will help ensure our voice is heard loud and clear on November 3r](http://sendy.sentbybeast.com/l/OAst8O6Rl3q4KZFnr763R83g/kAAAXqo3toAP29v763BPUTwA/uhtvKkfo9yrup7a7W8F763Xw)[d.](http://sendy.sentbybeast.com/l/OAst8O6Rl3q4KZFnr763R83g/kAAAXqo3toAP29v763BPUTwA/uhtvKkfo9yrup7a7W8F763Xw)

Thank you for your continued support.

clean_body: | Friend, Our fundraising deadline for the month of July is approaching at 11:59 pm tonight and my team has informed me that we are just $2,000 short of our monthly goal! I'm fighting every single day in Congress to make sure our region reaches its full potential and that our conservative values are protected - and that's why it so important that we reach our goal. My opponent, Nate McMurray, is running on the same platform as Nancy Pelosi, AOC, and the Socialist Squad - one that makes our country less safe, and our taxes much higher. I think that's ridiculous. That's why my focus is on supporting our small businesses, supporting our law enforcement, building our economy, and building up our infrastructure. Together let's build up our region, our economy, and our country and make sure this region has the strong conservative leadership it deserves. Thank you for your continued support. Sincerely, Chris Jacobs * 5501 Camp Road P.O. Box 893 Hamburg, NY 14075-9998 PAID FOR BY JACOBS FOR CONGRESS

name: Christina Finello
subject: I hate doing this (I’m asking for $5)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Finello for Congress
body:
Sorry for bothering you on a Friday night, but this can’t wait. We’re just $1,675 before midnight to hit our July fundraising goal. Can you cap off this week by chipping in $5 now?

---
| Peter,

Sorry for bothering you on a Friday night, but this can’t wait. We need to raise $1,675 before midnight to hit our July fundraising goal. [_**Can you cap off this week by chipping in $5 now?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18500911/230228281/608447696?refcode=BLU-FINE-20200731-2-EM&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjUyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiY2JkYjAyZS04ZWQzLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WjnX62jzU1VvoKxoQGAhT0qLxhRSJVChjp3tLfH1zZ8=)

Washington Republicans and their dark money backers are desperate to hang on to this seat and keep Brian Fitzpatrick in power. The **TIED** poll results have them nervous. We can’t let them spend their way to victory. We have to stay in the fight now.

**I don’t like asking you for money** —in fact, it’s my least favorite part of running for Congress, but I don’t have a choice. I don’t have billionaire buddies or corporate connections that I can call up to help us out. I will work to get money out of politics, but first, we need to win this race.

[_**Please, give $5 or more before midnight so we can stay on track to hit our July fundraising goal.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18500912/230228282/608447696?refcode=BLU-FINE-20200731-2-EM&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjUyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiY2JkYjAyZS04ZWQzLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WjnX62jzU1VvoKxoQGAhT0qLxhRSJVChjp3tLfH1zZ8=)

Have a great weekend!

Christina

Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email, with a check, or with a spouse -- thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If we got your name or any information wrong -- we're so sorry! To update and correct your information [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b9ec/1cd0ac28/179a6b154/357d3156/1477424142/VEsHDA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/update-your-information"). If you would like to receive fewer emails, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b9ec/1cd0ac28/179a6b154/357d3155/1477424142/VEsEBQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/less-emails"). If you would like to unsubscribe, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b9ec/1cd0ac28/179a6b154/357d3154/1477424142/VEsEBA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/content/Unsubscribe").

Peter, thank you so much for supporting Joe Biden's Presidential campaign.

[ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b9ec/1cd0ac28/179a6b154/357d3153/1477424142/VEsEBw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_footer&refcode=email-bsd-20190515host-b20_FDR_states_NA-F1_S1_C1")

This isn't the time to be complacent. If you are ready to fight for the soul of this nation, you can start by donating to elect Joe Biden by clicking the button below.

| [DONATE TO ELECT JOE BIDEN »](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b9ec/1cd0ac28/179a6b154/357d3152/1477424142/VEsEBg/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_footer?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2019.08.07_B8_footer_X__F1_S1_C1__footer&amount=25")
---

We know we send a lot of emails, and we are sorry about that. The reason? We are relying on grassroots supporters like you (we're serious!).

But Peter, we don't want to bother you. If you'd like to only receive our most important emails, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b9ec/1cd0ac28/179a6b154/357d3155/1477424142/VEsEAQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/less-emails"). If you'd only like to receive volunteer emails, [click here.](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b9ec/1cd0ac28/179a6b154/357d3151/1477424142/VEsEAA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/volunteer-emails") If you'd like to unsubscribe from our emails, you can [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b9ec/1cd0ac28/179a6b154/357d3154/1477424142/VEsEAw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/content/Unsubscribe").

To make a contribution by mail, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b9ec/1cd0ac28/179a6b154/357d3150/1477424142/VEsEAg/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://joebiden.com/contribute-by-mail/") for instructions.

We sincerely thank you for your help and support.
\- The entire Joe Biden for President team

name: =?utf-8?Q?Indiana=20Republican=20Party?=
subject: 95 days
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Indiana Republican Party
body:
It may seem hard to believe, but we’re now less than 100 days away from Election Day. And anyone who’s ever been involved with a campaign or a local.. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/indiana/95-days?e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| |
---
| **_95 Days_** It may seem hard to believe, but we’re now less than 100 days away from Election Day. And anyone who’s ever been involved with a campaign or a local party knows exactly what’s happening now inside our Indiana GOP headquarters and across the state.

With 95 days to go, we've entered the stretch of long days and hitting big goals. We’re planning and executing for activities, announcements and scheduled events over the next three months, and our grassroots teams are fanned out in ALL 92 counties.

Our Republican statewide ticket of**President Trump, Vice President Pence, Governor Holcomb, Lt. Governor Crouch** and attorney general nominee **Todd Rokita** are doing what it takes now to win in November.

Just yesterday, we were excited to announce that **Governor Holcomb** had earned [the endorsement of the Indiana REALTORS PAC](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=7da06f000a&e=1acd9bb3d6) and its 19,000 members statewide. In case you’re keeping track, that’s his eighth endorsement so far from a wide range of groups he’s bringing together to continue building One Indiana.

And on Monday, **Governor Holcomb’s** got another big announcement. I don’t want to spoil it now (you’ll have to wait for Monday), _**but if you want to hear the news first,[click here](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=1de6f25dd0&e=1acd9bb3d6) to sign up for texts from the campaign.**_

Just 95 days. There’s a lot that’ll happen between now and then, but I know that by working together, we’ll deliver more Republican victories on November 3.

\- Chairman Kyle Hupfer
---
|
---
| | **Governor Holcomb's Week That Was**
---
|
---
---
| **_The Hoosier Spirit!_** It's been another busy week for **Governor Holcomb**! Yesterday, he earned the endorsement of the Indiana REALTORS® PAC and attended the Muncie-Delaware Chamber of Commerce lunch.

The Indiana REALTORS® are a statewide trade association with 19,000 members involved in nearly all aspects of real estate. **Governor Holcomb** has worked to support a robust economy and real estate market across Indiana. As our state gets back on track, **Governor Holcomb** will continue working with our realtors, and all Hoosiers, to build One Indiana for all.

**Governor Holcomb** also attended the Muncie-Delaware Chamber of commerce lunch to talk about the Hoosier spirit and how we are in a strong position to bounce back from the effects of the COVID-19 pandemic. Hoosiers are strong and resilient, and there's nothing that we can't overcome when we stand together as One Indiana

To stay up to date on the latest developments, please make sure you're following** Governor Holcomb** on [Facebook](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=ff9ccb619b&e=1acd9bb3d6) and [Twitter](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=2c88635333&e=1acd9bb3d6)!
---
|
---
| [ ](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=fcd1be390a&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| **_BIG News from Governor Holcomb This Monday_** **Governor Holcomb** has got a big announcement he's making this Monday from his campaign. Want to be the first to hear the big news?

[Sign up here, and Governor Holcomb's team will text you the news before anyone else!](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=108db75fa5&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
|
---
| [ ](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=efc7701bdf&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| _**It's a Sign! Get Yours Now**_ Fresh off the presses, **Governor Holcomb’s** yard signs are in! We’ve had a team busy assembling them, and they’re currently on their way to communities across our state.

Want one for your yard? [Sign up here now!](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=693f2a8618&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
|
---
|
---
| _**Let's Get Social With Todd Rokita**_ Earlier this month, **Todd Rokita** officially became our Republican nominee for attorney general! He’s working to provide Hoosiers with certainty in uncertain times – and will be a staunch defender of our 2nd amendment rights, our small businesses, and the right to life as our state’s attorney general.

Are you following **Todd Rokita** on social media? Keep up with his campaign on [Facebook](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=23c6685db1&e=1acd9bb3d6) and on [Twitter](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=658ce76d15&e=1acd9bb3d6)!

Follow on Facebook - [https://www.facebook.com/ToddRokitaIN](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=363d1b79d2&e=1acd9bb3d6)
Follow on Twitter - [https://twitter.com/ToddRokitaIN](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=7a85eb61da&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
|
---
|
---
---
| _**Talking With Hoosiers**_ Last Saturday, we had another full team of volunteers out talking with Hoosiers across the state – including this group pictured that masked up and went door to door supporting **State Sen. John Ruckelshaus **in his race for reelection to the Indiana Senate!

Want to help our Republican team win up and down the ballot this November? [Sign up here](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=59d1f1607f&e=1acd9bb3d6), and a member of our team will be in touch to find the best way to help you make a difference this year!
---
| |
---
| **_Upcoming Events_**
[August 5](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=6d1e77258e&e=1acd9bb3d6): 30th Annual GOP Open
[August 7](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=d8f3b08ca1&e=1acd9bb3d6): Hancock County GOP Elephant Open
[August 8](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=10aa994f0d&e=1acd9bb3d6): St. Joseph County Lincoln Day Dinner
[August 14](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=59746f22c8&e=1acd9bb3d6): Harrison County Lincoln Day Dinner
[August 14-15](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=841f33ae2b&e=1acd9bb3d6): IRFW Tribute to Women & Statewide Meeting
[August 19](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=63de8c2748&e=1acd9bb3d6): Porter County Lincoln Day Dinner
[August 20](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=44046f2a87&e=1acd9bb3d6): Vanderburgh County Republican Party
[August 22](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=13f9685b64&e=1acd9bb3d6): Adams County GOP 5th Annual Benjamin Harrison Breakfast
[August 22](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=640f4dbb49&e=1acd9bb3d6): Reagan Day Dinner
[September ](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=42ae70c690&e=1acd9bb3d6)[12](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=db71da6d1b&e=1acd9bb3d6): Wells County Lincoln Day Dinner & Reagan Rally
[September 26](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=87c043883e&e=1acd9bb3d6): White County Lincoln Dinner
[October 2](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=f5a48f6062&e=1acd9bb3d6): Brown County Lincoln Day Dinner
[October 5](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=fa526618e4&e=1acd9bb3d6): Orange County GOP Annual Fall Dinner
[October 7](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=57e7801b1c&e=1acd9bb3d6): Kosciusko County Republican Fall Fish Fry
[October 15](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=8c62ed1ba3&e=1acd9bb3d6): Lincoln-Reagan Fall Dinner
[October 24](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=c6edc9e108&e=1acd9bb3d6): Adams County Lincoln Day Dinner
_Have an event to add? Please email it to [info@indiana.gop](mailto:info@indiana.gop)!_
---
|
---
| **_News You Can Use_** **Governor Eric Holcomb **[salutes the USS Indianapolis crew](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=adb3287a9c&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Lt. Governor Suzanne Crouch **[honors 150 farm families with Hoosier Homestead Award](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=c72eb7bd3a&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Senator Todd Young **[secures provisions in COVID-19 relief package](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=ebb050ebef&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Senator Mike Braun **[introduces Healthcare PRICE Transparency Act](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=9a1262712b&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Congresswoman Jackie Walorski **[announces 2020 Congressional App Challenge](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=a403ffeab2&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Congressman Jim Banks **[proposes Civil Justice for Victims of COVID-19 Act](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=908d94c66e&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Congressman Jim Baird** [discusses technology’s role in combating sex trafficking](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=ac2baa83eb&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Congresswoman Susan Brooks **[highlights current state of potential vaccines](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=fefb2d7729&e=1acd9bb3d6)

clean_body: It may seem hard to believe, but we’re now less than 100 days away from Election Day. And anyone who’s ever been involved with a campaign or a local.. | | | | | | 95 Days It may seem hard to believe, but we’re now less than 100 days away from Election Day. And anyone who’s ever been involved with a campaign or a local party knows exactly what’s happening now inside our Indiana GOP headquarters and across the state. With 95 days to go, we've entered the stretch of long days and hitting big goals. We’re planning and executing for activities, announcements and scheduled events over the next three months, and our grassroots teams are fanned out in ALL 92 counties. Our Republican statewide ticket ofPresident Trump, Vice President Pence, Governor Holcomb, Lt. Governor Crouch and attorney general nominee Todd Rokita are doing what it takes now to win in November. Just yesterday, we were excited to announce that Governor Holcomb had earned and its 19,000 members statewide. In case you’re keeping track, that’s his eighth endorsement so far from a wide range of groups he’s bringing together to continue building One Indiana. And on Monday, Governor Holcomb’s got another big announcement. I don’t want to spoil it now (you’ll have to wait for Monday), but if you want to hear the news first, to sign up for texts from the campaign. Just 95 days. There’s a lot that’ll happen between now and then, but I know that by working together, we’ll deliver more Republican victories on November 3. \- Chairman Kyle Hupfer | | | Governor Holcomb's Week That Was | | The Hoosier Spirit! It's been another busy week for Governor Holcomb! Yesterday, he earned the endorsement of the Indiana REALTORS® PAC and attended the Muncie-Delaware Chamber of Commerce lunch. The Indiana REALTORS® are a statewide trade association with 19,000 members involved in nearly all aspects of real estate. Governor Holcomb has worked to support a robust economy and real estate market across Indiana. As our state gets back on track, Governor Holcomb will continue working with our realtors, and all Hoosiers, to build One Indiana for all. Governor Holcomb also attended the Muncie-Delaware Chamber of commerce lunch to talk about the Hoosier spirit and how we are in a strong position to bounce back from the effects of the COVID-19 pandemic. Hoosiers are strong and resilient, and there's nothing that we can't overcome when we stand together as One Indiana To stay up to date on the latest developments, please make sure you're following Governor Holcomb on and ! | | | BIG News from Governor Holcomb This Monday Governor Holcomb has got a big announcement he's making this Monday from his campaign. Want to be the first to hear the big news? | | | It's a Sign! Get Yours Now Fresh off the presses, Governor Holcomb’s yard signs are in! We’ve had a team busy assembling them, and they’re currently on their way to communities across our state. Want one for your yard? | | | Let's Get Social With Todd Rokita Earlier this month, Todd Rokita officially became our Republican nominee for attorney general! He’s working to provide Hoosiers with certainty in uncertain times – and will be a staunch defender of our 2nd amendment rights, our small businesses, and the right to life as our state’s attorney general. Are you following Todd Rokita on social media? Keep up with his campaign on and on ! Follow on Facebook - Follow on Twitter - | | | Talking With Hoosiers Last Saturday, we had another full team of volunteers out talking with Hoosiers across the state – including this group pictured that masked up and went door to door supporting State Sen. John Ruckelshaus in his race for reelection to the Indiana Senate! Want to help our Republican team win up and down the ballot this November? , and a member of our team will be in touch to find the best way to help you make a difference this year! | | | Upcoming Events : 30th Annual GOP Open : Hancock County GOP Elephant Open : St. Joseph County Lincoln Day Dinner : Harrison County Lincoln Day Dinner : IRFW Tribute to Women & Statewide Meeting : Porter County Lincoln Day Dinner : Vanderburgh County Republican Party : Adams County GOP 5th Annual Benjamin Harrison Breakfast : Reagan Day Dinner : Wells County Lincoln Day Dinner & Reagan Rally : White County Lincoln Dinner : Brown County Lincoln Day Dinner : Orange County GOP Annual Fall Dinner : Kosciusko County Republican Fall Fish Fry : Lincoln-Reagan Fall Dinner : Adams County Lincoln Day Dinner Have an event to add? Please email it to mailto:info@indiana.gop! | | News You Can Use Governor Eric Holcomb Lt. Governor Suzanne Crouch Senator Todd Young Senator Mike Braun Congresswoman Jackie Walorski Congressman Jim Banks Congressman Jim Baird Congresswoman Susan Brooks Congressman Greg Pence Congressman Larry Bucshon Congressman Trey Hollingsworth | | | | | | | | | | | | | Copyright © 2020 Indiana Republican State Committee, Inc., All rights reserved.

Margaret Good for Congress

Margaret Good is a lawyer, runner, and state representative running in FL-16 to change the face of Southwest Florida, and we are so proud to have you on our team. name: Gina Raimondo
subject: School Edition: Learning from Childcare
body:
Your RI COVID-19 News Update
---
| | | | | |
---
| Hello friend,
I know people are scared about what going back to school will look like for Rhode Island. And then comes the question, should kids be in school? I think that's the wrong question. Of course kids should be in school - but only if it can be done safely. We know from health experts that there are countless benefits to in-person learning - socially, mentally, nutritionally, physically, developmentally. Our job is to make it as safe as possible. That's the same approach we've taken in reopening every part of our economy. When we opened childcare centers two months ago, we didn't ask if kids should be in childcare. We asked how could we reopen childcare safely. And with thousands of kids and adult staff in childcare sites daily over the last two months, we've had only a handful of cases, and we have responded quickly and effectively to every one.
As with every decision we've made during this crisis, our efforts to reopen our schools will be driven by science and data. We've identified a clear, comprehensive set of metrics and benchmarks we need to hit in order to be confident we're ready to fully reopen schools. And we've assembled a team of local and national health experts to guide us during this process. The week of August 16, we'll have our recommendation on what level of reopening we expect to see based on where we are at that point. We're looking at five metrics to determine if we can safely reopen schools: statewide readiness, municipal readiness, testing readiness, supply readiness, and operational readiness.
It's our job to work day and night to get to a point where we can say with confidence we check every box on this list. If not, then it means we're not ready to fully reopen on August 31, and we'll instead opt for one of the more limited reopening options. Every school district must be prepared with both in-person and remote learning options, and parents will be able to choose the option they're most comfortable with.
---
|
---
| In this week's education forum, Education Commissioner Angelica Infante-Green and I were joined by Dr. Sten Vermund, a pediatrician and infectious disease expert and the Dean of the Yale School of Public Health, to talk about ways we can mitigate risk for our students and teachers. We were also joined by Department of Human Services Director Courtney Hawkins for her report on our experience with childcare.
We had a great discussion about what we've learned from reopening our childcare centers, how we can apply those lessons to reopening schools, and what we can all do to make that happen. One part of the conversation that resonated with me was Dr. Vermund talking as an educator and a parent about whether he would feel safe sending his kids back to school. That discussion, [which starts at 25:39 in the video](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0019gcF-a4RdsBwIufjVdugCBpXDaN58bn4P21qM_JaRH8D7oEWpa56RsGhFi0brQAPPyn9eHen3ncb0Yxr94A-cQhjUGRP4aj6upKtW4QiqsNwvFvz2s9uLCEdOylXsdEJkPZY2zqdE639FA91x_za_6pAZ7z2GuS9SgoEIhcp0ES8u8GUZ6OSvCdXh8rMVX2UXiAsQVq60faoJbzeImR1dexIUZ4eoFEA&c=wWie2bj6S8epurAUYxqTntoOAGMNo5N3Du9_eZcFdaOplvCrlimnEQ==&ch=vlvqdj96FZF2XQghV4DT2M9VESS_vDkdW9ARwJwzghz8hh3e5dTH_Q==), was an important testament to the benefits of reopening school in the fall.
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0019gcF-a4RdsBwIufjVdugCBpXDaN58bn4P21qM_JaRH8D7oEWpa56RsGhFi0brQAPX_8bwFXmlu4csPS7CEnRN2nQxDTij6wBGS6F46xeTamnQ77IgMVlVBAJMCp3IMao5GMWAnhm8dhUvFodnUmHknAznaK5B5UT6PnyfhF2MBhTU0E5QJ9SfQeq1dI8JPSchLSLfrIohsUO8ea1FE8UYT6zSGEnivmw&c=wWie2bj6S8epurAUYxqTntoOAGMNo5N3Du9_eZcFdaOplvCrlimnEQ==&ch=vlvqdj96FZF2XQghV4DT2M9VESS_vDkdW9ARwJwzghz8hh3e5dTH_Q==)
---
| Commissioner Infante-Green and I are committed to giving our schools the resources they need to make reopening a success. I know this is a scary time, but we are listening to health experts, education professionals, and parents and teachers across Rhode Islanders to make our decisions about schools this fall. We're all in this together,
-Gina Raimondo Governor

clean_body: Your RI COVID-19 News Update | | | | | | | Hello friend, I know people are scared about what going back to school will look like for Rhode Island. And then comes the question, should kids be in school? I think that's the wrong question. Of course kids should be in school - but only if it can be done safely. We know from health experts that there are countless benefits to in-person learning - socially, mentally, nutritionally, physically, developmentally. Our job is to make it as safe as possible. That's the same approach we've taken in reopening every part of our economy. When we opened childcare centers two months ago, we didn't ask if kids should be in childcare. We asked how could we reopen childcare safely. And with thousands of kids and adult staff in childcare sites daily over the last two months, we've had only a handful of cases, and we have responded quickly and effectively to every one. As with every decision we've made during this crisis, our efforts to reopen our schools will be driven by science and data. We've identified a clear, comprehensive set of metrics and benchmarks we need to hit in order to be confident we're ready to fully reopen schools. And we've assembled a team of local and national health experts to guide us during this process. The week of August 16, we'll have our recommendation on what level of reopening we expect to see based on where we are at that point. We're looking at five metrics to determine if we can safely reopen schools: statewide readiness, municipal readiness, testing readiness, supply readiness, and operational readiness. It's our job to work day and night to get to a point where we can say with confidence we check every box on this list. If not, then it means we're not ready to fully reopen on August 31, and we'll instead opt for one of the more limited reopening options. Every school district must be prepared with both in-person and remote learning options, and parents will be able to choose the option they're most comfortable with. | | In this week's education forum, Education Commissioner Angelica Infante-Green and I were joined by Dr. Sten Vermund, a pediatrician and infectious disease expert and the Dean of the Yale School of Public Health, to talk about ways we can mitigate risk for our students and teachers. We were also joined by Department of Human Services Director Courtney Hawkins for her report on our experience with childcare. We had a great discussion about what we've learned from reopening our childcare centers, how we can apply those lessons to reopening schools, and what we can all do to make that happen. One part of the conversation that resonated with me was Dr. Vermund talking as an educator and a parent about whether he would feel safe sending his kids back to school. That discussion, ==, was an important testament to the benefits of reopening school in the fall. | == | Commissioner Infante-Green and I are committed to giving our schools the resources they need to make reopening a success. I know this is a scary time, but we are listening to health experts, education professionals, and parents and teachers across Rhode Islanders to make our decisions about schools this fall. We're all in this together, -Gina Raimondo Governor | == | Click the graph to see check the Department of Health's ==. | P.S.: Information is our greatest weapon in the fight against COVID-19, If you or someone you know wants to sign up to receive these emails, you can use ==. | | Governor's Office | 82 Smith Street, Providence, RI 02903 | | Sent by mailto:communications@governor.ri.gov powered by
