body:
🚩 Liberal Bill Clifford is receiving $420k of support from Democrat Michael Bloomberg |
---
| |
---
| | A Michael Bloomberg funded front group is spending BIG in this race to [elect](https://traceymann.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60a16ea89a176679a5f31366c&id=181494e30b&e=a9d1410029) Bill Clifford! The total is now up over $400,000.

This same group last week placed $187,000 to support a Democrat in Hawaii - the same day they spent an additional $30,000 for Bill Clifford! Michael Bloomberg himself gave this group $250,000!

If that isn't bad enough, want to know where the rest of the money comes from? Jeff Bezos and his rich family members. Jeff Bezos and his family gave the group more than $14,000,000 in 2018!

This group only gives to liberal Republicans and Democrats.

They cover themselves as a veterans group but what they really want is to elect Republicans that will work with Nancy Pelosi to implement their big government agenda. They even make the candidates sign a pledge to work with Pelosi Democrats before they spend money on their behalf.

Check out this [link](https://traceymann.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60a16ea89a176679a5f31366c&id=cc15666ee0&e=a9d1410029) that describes the massive spending this group made to move Texas left.

All this spending from Bloomberg comes on top of the $800,000 Bill Clifford has personally put in the race telling lies. He's lied about where I live, how I vote, and who I support.

And despite the Bloomberg/Clifford money in this race, we have the momentum as we close out the final five days in the campaign. Because we are powered by KANSANS just like you.

Your support means the world to me and Audrey. We look forward to seeing you on the trail in the next few days.

Yours in the fight.
---
|

| Tracey

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: Five Stories President Trump Doesn’t Want You to Miss
body:
Texas Couple Has Saved 68 Lives and Counting With Their COVID-19 Plasma Donations | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=86a91c52d3&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| **_FIVE STORIES PRESIDENT TRUMP DOESN'T WANT YOU TO MISS_**
---
| | | [**Texas Couple Has Saved 68 Lives and Counting With Their COVID-19 Plasma Donations**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=890731c301&e=3ee4985eea)
-Good Morning America
“Brian and Dina Murphy of San Antonio, Texas, have made it their mission to help others by donating plasma to 68 people after both fell ill with [Coronavirus] in March,” Angeline Bernabe writes. “I felt that really, God really saved me and to be a survivor," Dina said. “I felt that this is really what he wants me to do—to help others.”

🎬 **President Trump:**[**If you had COVID-19, donate plasma to save lives!**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=6aaba2b598&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| [**There Is No Substitute for Proactive Policing**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=3515c986bc&e=3ee4985eea)
-_City Journal_
“As budget cuts begin to affect police personnel, departments may have to pull officers from proactive activities and place them in response cars to manage the demand for emergency calls,” criminal justice professor William Sousa writes. If 20th-century American history is any guide, “higher rates of crime and disorder will likely result.”

🎬**WATCH:**[**Attacks on law enforcement have led to a violent crime surge**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=c1c4bd821e&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| [**Restoring America's Energy Dominance**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=e0adcc94b3&e=3ee4985eea)
_-The Marshall News Messenger_
“In the very near term, President Trump championed the Paycheck Protection Program (PPP) which helped bring the energy industry back from the brink of collapse in the face of plunging prices as a result of the pandemic . . . In the longer term, President Trump has rolled back stifling regulations which have constrained American energy production,” Texas state Rep. Chris Paddie writes.
---
|
---
| [**Ben Carson: How HUD Is Helping Ohio’s Foster Youth**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8b2352f506&e=3ee4985eea)
-Cleveland.com
One year ago, “HUD launched the Foster Youth to Independence (FYI) Initiative, a unique program offering housing vouchers to localities to award to foster youth so they can receive rental assistance when obtaining their first home in the private rental market,” Housing & Urban Development Secretary Ben Carson writes. “To date, 26 states have received funding for 680 individual vouchers, for a total of $5.6 million.”

**First Lady Melania Trump:**[**“A team effort to help America’s children”**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=6479c1e2fa&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| [**These Kids Are Getting Left Behind When Schools Go Online**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=c200d4e7c8&e=3ee4985eea)
-CNN
According to experts, “millions of school-age children live in households without home internet service, high-speed internet, access to computer devices or help from parents who know how to use them,” Catherine Shoichet reports. “Last spring, some schools warned they were seeing a growing number of students missing online classes.”

🎬 **President Trump:**[**Reopen schools by protecting at-risk populations**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=0e6b8f0062&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=73f48ba153&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=98e7099415&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=c41a8eade1)
---
| | | The White House * 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW * Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111
---

clean_body: DEADLINE TONIGHT | Friend, Georgia has emerged as THE battleground state in 2020. Stacey Abrams came within 55,000 votes of becoming Governor, running against the man who oversaw his own election. Since then, more than 750,000 NEW VOTERS are now registered and eligible to vote in Georgia! Now, Georgia Democrat Jon Ossoff is NECK AND NECK with GOP Senator David Perdue in the polls, and the Cook Political Report has officially declared this race a TOSS-UP! BUT -- and this part's crucial, friend -- to pull off a win in Georgia, we need to double down on our efforts to defend voting rights and build an unprecedented voter protection program. Grassroots movements with mighty organizing and voter protection programs cost money, friend, and we need your support ASAP! name: Andrew
subject: What we’re up against...
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GARBARINO FOR CONGRESS |
body:
After a contentious primary fight, the real battle against Jackie Gordon has begun, and this is what we’re up against. | |
---
[ ](http://links.garbarinoforny.com/u/click?_t=7b77702d6650435d80b420c1495e37a8&_m=82670659b33245ceb3d92c05585ea4d1&_e=rHRHg7r2wS5n8XBt-9FJdTb3XnKc-xGHTqoaLTttBEewDDWgSmFn4XFmhhW9pew-S6hoP6hKj4FwaTc_ew_-auG-bcwO1K7DonjTUbHWGAHiNOgvsF8BNMdygAFLYKI9u4lTi8ztP7KLv278z3GTmGF-SlCvjT7CUKWA9T--XZD6h13t23QhrB73pw-dZ3m9n3LCSP2GPXNQGBBCvyq9VOuIGBN_QynA0L-PHIgiTZqiZRk-nJwySUdZaRrvjkM2y7JkkVgkN7YLf08Fpq0HIfUjlCE0eTwNeTuy5qdcpaUW68ysF4C8ilTJ8dBi9ZBPSIHgH5fc2yhUhZO98mpApSZeW_ZWAJalPaEWEQ3A7p6_psasmEjvI-7gvbEsY0oPt672tYxVJGfPgNsZOa7UsI3K4hQvzOIwJVqp-FsSnZpJzOia8VVJN8WiXh6Ax7pD)
Peter, it’s Andrew.

After a contentious primary fight, the real battle against Jackie Gordon has begun, and this is what we’re up against.

**Jackie Gordon has raised $1.1 MILLION for this race, and we’re quickly falling behind. **

This doesn't come as a surprise, though. My opponent Jackie Gordon has already taken donations from Hollywood liberals like Chelsea Handler, national left-wing organizations, and anti-2nd Amendment groups. That’s because she knows she needs all the outside help she can get to win this election.

**Unlike Jackie Gordon, I built my campaign on hometown and grassroots values, and I prefer my supporters to be from Long Island, not Los Angeles.**

But, I can’t fight off all these Hollywood liberals and national organizations by myself. That’s why I’m reaching out to you today. A group of dedicated Republicans like yourself who have agreed to _**300% MATCH** _every donation until midnight tonight! **That means every $1 you donate; it will have 3x the impact on our campaign**! In addition, my team has set up a Primary Victory Money Bomb to help me CRUSH this End of Month goal!
[ ](http://links.garbarinoforny.com/u/click?_t=7b77702d6650435d80b420c1495e37a8&_m=82670659b33245ceb3d92c05585ea4d1&_e=rHRHg7r2wS5n8XBt-9FJdTb3XnKc-xGHTqoaLTttBEewDDWgSmFn4XFmhhW9pew-S6hoP6hKj4FwaTc_ew_-auG-bcwO1K7DonjTUbHWGAHiNOgvsF8BNMdygAFLYKI9u4lTi8ztP7KLv278z3GTmGF-SlCvjT7CUKWA9T--XZD6h13t23QhrB73pw-dZ3m9n3LCSP2GPXNQGBBCvyq9VOuIGBN_QynA0L-PHIgiTZp9e8bfTx6ACSodL0JPSDBQLGqfFYL2UwwRG4Bbm7njdTlDfHC818ulcQPzoMehpdLodryD-EHeODEVmKmV_5JeIyfEY2s04Pw8QViVdOpIHounRJwsssszsvNiR2pOrcmMBELJBh0rhUAmFABCovHC-fPZk6XH4mZ3Sm2dQ6d7ELjWu4H1i92Q3Rb4y_LeU75cViUXfyjA-Hs4INgqz1B8)
|
---
**End of Month Deadline**

# With Tens of Thousands of Ballots Unaccounted for, Hirsh Singh Demands a Recount

**LINWOOD, NJ** — With over 40,000 ballots not yet reported and over 27,000 ballots known to have been thrown away and not counted, Republican U.S. Senate candidate Hirsh Singh has filed for recounts in all 21 New Jersey counties.

Singh has announced he is seeking a recount in the still-uncertified U.S. Senate race more than three weeks after the Primary Election took place.

“The people pay taxes to have fair and open elections. They deserve to have their votes counted. Their voices will not be silenced,” Singh said.

"This election is replete with disparities, discrepancies, and irregularities," said Singh, who has been fighting to receive information on the number of basic votes and other pertinent election data from each of New Jersey’s 21 counties since July 7th, the date of the Primary Election.

Singh said so far, judges in four counties have signed orders authorizing recounts to commence while hearings are set to be held in four more counties today.

"Phil Murphy has caused chaos, concern, and confusion that Vladimir Putin and the Chinese Communist Party could only dream of," Singh said. “Tens of thousands of voters have been disenfranchised as a result of his mandatory vote-by-mail scheme, and he and his cronies in Trenton seem content to normalize these deficiencies and erode our tradition of holding fair, open, and honest elections. Not on my watch."

In seeking recounts in each of the 21 counties, Singh has cited a multitude of troubling issues:
* Ballots postmarked July 8th were improperly counted and/or separated from ballots postmarked on July 7th; the deadline by which all vote-by-mail ballots were to be accepted
* Ballots marked with a clear intention by the voter but that were unable to be read by vote-counting machines
* Ballots thrown out for minor matters such as stray markings
* Ballots thrown out for lack of response to "cure" letters; a process that is wholly unfamiliar to voters
* Ballots counted in secret, without campaign challengers having the benefit of being present for the process
* Ballots found in unsealed bags without chain-of-custody history
* Ballots rejected for unspecified/unreported reasons

Singh said the circumstances surrounding this election are unprecedented. He could think of no other election in recent memory where tens of thousands of voters were disenfranchised, and where a candidate seeking basic information on his election was illegally denied that information or ignored by elections officials.

"This would never happen in a regular New Jersey election, Singh said. "Would tens of thousands of people be told in traditional polling places like firehouses, gymnasiums or community centers across the state, ‘Sorry, but your vote doesn't count this year?'

"The people wouldn't stand for it. The people would outright reject it. But Phil Murphy and his team of lackeys in the Attorney General's Office think they can trick the people of NJ because the election was conducted by mail."

Singh said that if the votes from this unprecedented Primary Election are not properly and transparently counted across the state, Murphy and his minions would try to get away with even more shenanigans this November.

clean_body: “The people pay taxes to have fair and open elections. They deserve to have their votes counted. Their voices will not be silenced,” Singh said. | | | Dear Friend, Do you remember what I told you when we first embarked on our journey to restore New Jersey and save America? I told you that the closer we came to victory, the more terrified and desperate our opposition would become. They are throwing everything at us right now. We are literally inches from the finish line, neck-and-neck with a RINO Democrat, and the establishment is doing everything they can to resist our victory. Let's secure our win now. Check out my team's press release to see what we're doing to ensure a fair and honest election. In spite of Phil Murphy and AG Grewal's machinations, we've managed to stay ahead of the fight because of contributions from patriots like you. I can't do this alone. I need your to ensure we can implement a statewide recount. We are combating the Attorney General on every front and need your financial support to ensure victory: | "DEMAND RECOUNT NOW" | This election will set the stage for future elections in America. We cannot afford to let it fall into the hands of the radical left. They are scared of losing their power — and they should be. With your help, we'll make sure their time is up. -Hirsh | | | | July 30th, 2020 FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE Contact: mailto:press@hirshsingh.com?subject=RE%3A%2011-09-19%20Press%20Release | | With Tens of Thousands of Ballots Unaccounted for, Hirsh Singh Demands a Recount LINWOOD, NJ — With over 40,000 ballots not yet reported and over 27,000 ballots known to have been thrown away and not counted, Republican U.S. Senate candidate Hirsh Singh has filed for recounts in all 21 New Jersey counties. Singh has announced he is seeking a recount in the still-uncertified U.S. Senate race more than three weeks after the Primary Election took place. “The people pay taxes to have fair and open elections. They deserve to have their votes counted. Their voices will not be silenced,” Singh said. "This election is replete with disparities, discrepancies, and irregularities," said Singh, who has been fighting to receive information on the number of basic votes and other pertinent election data from each of New Jersey’s 21 counties since July 7th, the date of the Primary Election. Singh said so far, judges in four counties have signed orders authorizing recounts to commence while hearings are set to be held in four more counties today. "Phil Murphy has caused chaos, concern, and confusion that Vladimir Putin and the Chinese Communist Party could only dream of," Singh said. “Tens of thousands of voters have been disenfranchised as a result of his mandatory vote-by-mail scheme, and he and his cronies in Trenton seem content to normalize these deficiencies and erode our tradition of holding fair, open, and honest elections. Not on my watch." In seeking recounts in each of the 21 counties, Singh has cited a multitude of troubling issues: Ballots postmarked July 8th were improperly counted and/or separated from ballots postmarked on July 7th; the deadline by which all vote-by-mail ballots were to be accepted Ballots marked with a clear intention by the voter but that were unable to be read by vote-counting machines Ballots thrown out for minor matters such as stray markings Ballots thrown out for lack of response to "cure" letters; a process that is wholly unfamiliar to voters Ballots counted in secret, without campaign challengers having the benefit of being present for the process Ballots found in unsealed bags without chain-of-custody history Ballots rejected for unspecified/unreported reasons Singh said the circumstances surrounding this election are unprecedented. He could think of no other election in recent memory where tens of thousands of voters were disenfranchised, and where a candidate seeking basic information on his election was illegally denied that information or ignored by elections officials. "This would never happen in a regular New Jersey election, Singh said. "Would tens of thousands of people be told in traditional polling places like firehouses, gymnasiums or community centers across the state, ‘Sorry, but your vote doesn't count this year?' "The people wouldn't stand for it. The people would outright reject it. But Phil Murphy and his team of lackeys in the Attorney General's Office think they can trick the people of NJ because the election was conducted by mail." Singh said that if the votes from this unprecedented Primary Election are not properly and transparently counted across the state, Murphy and his minions would try to get away with even more shenanigans this November. | ### For any inquiries, please reply to this message or send an email to: mailto:press@hirshsingh.com?subject=RE%3A%2011-09-19%20Press%20Release Additional information is available on our and page. Thank you, The Singh for Senate Press Team For the People | | | | | | | | | | | | | | PAID FOR BY SINGH FOR SENATE | Copyright © 2020 Singh for Senate, Inc., All rights reserved. name: Mark Warner
subject: Not a chance.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
|
---

| | Derek --

I was **stunned** when I saw the President of the United States threaten to postpone the November election. Even for Donald Trump, this is something new, something downright dangerous. | [](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85db99/53d9897e/54157378/1c8827be/1589667534/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjY4OCJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-julymatch?refcode=20200731_f_2_nd__688__&refcode2=graphic&amount=5")
---
We cannot let this President use the pandemic as an excuse to undermine our American system of free and fair elections. From his repeated lies about safe and secure mail-in ballots, to his attacks on the Postal Service that will deliver them, and his open embrace of foreign interference, we know that is exactly what is happening before our eyes.

Here's the truth, Derek. We are in a fight for our democracy. We must do everything we can between now and election day to get this President and his enablers out of office. That starts with keeping Virginia blue. It's virtually impossible to elect Joe Biden and flip the Senate if we don't.

**That's why I have to ask you for your help tonight. If we are going to successfully execute our voter turnout operation and win this November, we have to hit our monthly fundraising goal. Chip in by midnight tonight and _your contribution will automatically be doubled._**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
